---
title: "Untitled" 
format: html
editor: visual 
execute:
  # #include = FALSE    代码和结果都隐藏或都输出
  # #results = "hide"   隐藏文本
  echo: true # 显示/隐藏代码
  # eval: false # 执行/不执行代码
  # warning: FALSE
  # message: FALSE
  warning: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

### 清空环境

```{r}
#| label: 清空环境
rm(list = ls())
```

### 多年气象图

样例数据（Meteostat 开放气象数据平台（<https://meteostat.net/）>默认的日数据的数据结构）

![](images/clipboard-3843068606.png){width="213" height="59"}

```{r}
library(ggh4x)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(readxl)
library(gtable)
library(grid)
library(stringr)
library(showtext)
library(gridExtra)

showtext_auto()
font_add(family = "SimHei", regular = "C:/Windows/Fonts/simhei.ttf")

file_name <- "2024qixiang.xlsx"
df_raw <- read_excel(file_name)
df_raw <- as.data.frame(df_raw)

df_daily <- df_raw %>%
  mutate(
    DateTime = time,
    Date = as.Date(DateTime)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  summarise(
    Temp_Avg = temp,
    Temp_Max = tmax,
    Temp_Min = tmin,
    Humidity_Avg = rhum,
    Precip_Sum = prcp,
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(Date) %>%
  mutate(Year = year(Date))

# =======================================================
# 双轴缩放系数
# =======================================================
ylim_min <- -10
ylim_max <- 42
ylim_precip <- 102
coeff_precip <- (ylim_max - ylim_min) / ylim_precip
ylim_hum <- 100
coeff_hum <- (ylim_max - ylim_min) / ylim_hum

# =======================================================
# 构建单年图函数（返回 g_final grob）
# =======================================================
build_year_grob <- function(df_year, year_label, show_xaxis = FALSE) {
  
  p <- ggplot(df_year, aes(x = Date)) +
    
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = Date - 0.4, xmax = Date + 0.4,
                  ymin = ylim_min,
                  ymax = ylim_min + (Precip_Sum * coeff_precip),
                  fill = "降雨量"),
              alpha = 0.8) +
    
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = Temp_Min, ymax = Temp_Max, fill = "日温度范围"),
                alpha = 0.4, color = "#4D7668", size = 0.2) +
    
    geom_line(aes(y = Temp_Avg, color = "日平均温度"), linewidth = 0.4) +
    
    geom_line(aes(y = ylim_min + (Humidity_Avg * coeff_hum), color = "相对湿度"),
              linewidth = 0.4) +
    
    # 年份标注（右上角）
    annotate("text", x = max(df_year$Date), y = ylim_max - 1,
             label = as.character(year_label),
             hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold",
             family = "SimHei") +
    
    scale_fill_manual(name = "",
                      values = c("日温度范围" = "#C5D9E2",
                                 "降雨量" = "#4CACD6")) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "",
                       values = c("日平均温度" = "#F08A8A",
                                  "相对湿度" = "#F5B955")) +
    
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = expression(bold("温度 ("*degree*"C)")),
      limits = c(ylim_min, ylim_max),
      expand = c(0, 0),
      sec.axis = sec_axis(~ (. - ylim_min) / coeff_precip,
                          name = "降雨量 (mm)")
    ) +
    
    scale_x_date(
      name = if (show_xaxis) "日期" else "",
      date_labels = "%m-%d",
      date_breaks = "1 month",
      expand = c(0.01, 0)
    ) +
    
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      text = element_text(family = "SimHei"),
      legend.position = if (show_xaxis) "none" else "top",  # 仅顶图显示图例
      legend.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0, unit = "pt"),
      legend.text = element_text(margin = margin(r = 2, unit = "pt"), size = 10, face = "bold"),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.2),
      axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.15, "cm"),
      axis.ticks.length.x = unit(-0.15, "cm"),
      axis.text.x = if (show_xaxis) {
        element_text(margin = margin(t = 5), size = 10, colour = "black", face = "bold")
      } else {
        element_blank()
      },
      axis.title.x = if (show_xaxis) {
        element_text(size = 10, colour = "black", face = "bold")
      } else {
        element_blank()
      },
      axis.ticks.x = if (show_xaxis) element_line() else element_blank(),
      axis.text.y.left = element_text(color = "#F08A8A", margin = margin(r = 1), size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y.left = element_text(color = "#F08A8A", margin = margin(r = 1), size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.ticks.y.left = element_line(color = "#F08A8A"),
      axis.line.y.left = element_line(color = "#F08A8A", linewidth = 1),
      axis.line.y.right = element_line(color = "#4CACD6", linewidth = 1.2),
      axis.text.y.right = element_text(color = "#4CACD6", margin = margin(l = 1), size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y.right = element_text(color = "#4CACD6", angle = 270, margin = margin(r = 1), size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.ticks.y.right = element_line(color = "#4CACD6")
    )
  
  # 辅助图（黄色湿度轴）
  p_axis3 <- ggplot(df_year, aes(x = Date)) +
    geom_blank() +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(ylim_min, ylim_max), expand = c(0, 0),
      sec.axis = sec_axis(~ (. - ylim_min) / coeff_hum, name = "相对湿度 (%)")
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      text = element_text(family = "SimHei"),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y.left = element_blank(), axis.title.y.left = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.15, "cm"),
      axis.text.y.right = element_text(color = "#F5B955", size = 10, face = "bold", margin = margin(r = 0,l = 5)),
      axis.title.y.right = element_text(color = "#F5B955", margin = margin(l = 3), angle = 270, size = 10, face = "bold", vjust = 0),
      axis.ticks.y.right = element_line(color = "#F5B955"),
      axis.line.y.right = element_line(color = "#F5B955", linewidth = 1)
    )
  
  # Gtable 拼接（与原代码逻辑完全一致）
  g_main   <- ggplotGrob(p)
  g_axis3  <- ggplotGrob(p_axis3)
  
  index_green_axis  <- which(g_axis3$layout$name == "axis-r")
  grob_green_axis   <- g_axis3$grobs[[index_green_axis]]
  width_green_axis  <- g_axis3$widths[g_axis3$layout[index_green_axis, "l"]]
  
  index_green_label <- which(g_axis3$layout$name == "ylab-r")
  grob_green_label  <- g_axis3$grobs[[index_green_label]]
  width_green_label <- g_axis3$widths[g_axis3$layout[index_green_label, "l"]]
  
  index_blue_label  <- which(g_main$layout$name == "ylab-r")
  col_insert_pos    <- g_main$layout[index_blue_label, "l"]
  
  width_gap <- unit(0.2, "cm")
  g_final <- gtable_add_cols(g_main,
                             widths = unit.c(width_gap, width_green_axis, width_green_label),
                             pos = col_insert_pos)
  
  index_panel <- which(g_main$layout$name == "panel")
  panel_t <- g_main$layout[index_panel, "t"]
  panel_b <- g_main$layout[index_panel, "b"]
  
  g_final <- gtable_add_grob(g_final, grob_green_axis,
                             t = panel_t, b = panel_b,
                             l = col_insert_pos + 2)
  g_final <- gtable_add_grob(g_final, grob_green_label,
                             t = panel_t, b = panel_b,
                             l = col_insert_pos + 3)
  
  return(g_final)
}

# =======================================================
# 按年份拆分并构建各年 grob
# =======================================================
years <- sort(unique(df_daily$Year))
n_years <- length(years)

grob_list <- vector("list", n_years)
for (i in seq_along(years)) {
  df_year <- df_daily %>% filter(Year == years[i])
  show_x  <- (i == n_years)  # 仅最后一个子图显示 X 轴
  grob_list[[i]] <- build_year_grob(df_year, years[i], show_xaxis = show_x)
}

# =======================================================
# 统一各子图列宽后垂直拼接
# =======================================================
# 对齐所有子图的列宽（使坐标轴对齐）
max_widths <- do.call(unit.pmax, lapply(grob_list, function(g) g$widths))
grob_list  <- lapply(grob_list, function(g) { g$widths <- max_widths; g })

g_combined <- do.call(arrangeGrob, c(grob_list, list(ncol = 1)))
# =======================================================
# 输出
# =======================================================
grid.newpage()
grid.draw(g_combined)

ggsave("qixiang.pdf",
       plot   = g_combined,
       width  = 5.6,
       height = 2.42 * n_years,
       device = cairo_pdf)
```

### RGB颜色数字对应R中的编码

```{r}
#| label: 颜色转换
rgb(239, 117, 113, maxColorValue = 255)
```

### 包载入

```{r}
#| include: false
packages <- c("readxl", "dplyr", "tidyr", "ggplot2", "car", "agricolae", "FSA", "rstatix", "openxlsx", "ggpubr", "multcompView","stringr", "ggpattern", "ggcorrplot", "Hmisc", "showtext","gridExtra", "grid", "extrafont","reshape2","MASS","tibble","flextable","officer","plotly","htmlwidgets","webshot2","remotes","knitr","crop", "RColorBrewer","circlize")

new_packages <- packages[!(packages %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"])]
if(length(new_packages)) install.packages(new_packages)
lapply(packages, require, character.only = TRUE)
font_add(family = "SimHei", regular = "C:/Windows/Fonts/simhei.ttf")
showtext_auto()  
font_family <- "SimHei"
```

### 保存文件夹

```{r}
output_dir <- "ceshi" # 新目录
if(!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir)
```

### 数据导入

2024297.xlsx 的样例结构，性状数无限制，按第一行分组，按第二行求平均后进行方差分析等

![](images/clipboard-793691993.png){width="330"}

单位对照表的样例结构，有无影响不大

![英文对照表的样例结构，有无影响不大](images/clipboard-1304171994.png){width="330"}

![](images/clipboard-995130501.png){width="330"}

```{r}
file_name <- "2024297.xlsx" 

raw_danwei <- read_excel(
  file_name,
  sheet = "单位对照表"
)
raw_suoxie <-read_excel(
  file_name,
  sheet = "英文对照表"
)
raw_data1 <- read_excel(file_name)
raw_data2<- raw_data1 %>%
  group_by(across(1:2)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(),\(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = 'drop')
df_plot1 <- raw_data2
raw_data <- raw_data2[, -2]
first_value <<- colnames(raw_data)[1]
colnames(raw_data)[1] <- "Group"
raw_data$Group <- as.factor(raw_data$Group)
traits <- colnames(raw_data)[-1] 
raw_data4 <- raw_data1[, -2]
colnames(raw_data4)[1] <- "Group"
raw_data4$Group <- as.factor(raw_data4$Group)
raw_data5<- raw_data1 %>%
  group_by(across (1)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(),\(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = 'drop')
raw_data5 <- raw_data5[, -2]
```

### 基础数据统计（均值、标准差、变幅）

```{r}
#| label: 基础统计

# file_name <- "2024297.xlsx"
#
# raw_danwei <- read_excel(
#   file_name,
#   sheet = "单位对照表"
# )
# raw_suoxie <-read_excel(
#   file_name,
#   sheet = "英文对照表"
# )
# raw_data1 <- read_excel(file_name)
  raw_data6 <- raw_data1 %>%
  group_by(across(1)) %>%
  summarise(
    across(where(is.numeric),
           ~paste(sprintf("%.2f", mean(., na.rm = TRUE)),
                  sprintf("%.2f", sd(., na.rm = TRUE)),
                  sep = " ± "),
           .names = "{col}_均值±SD"),
    across(where(is.numeric),
           ~paste(sprintf("%.2f", min(., na.rm = TRUE)),
                  sprintf("%.2f", max(., na.rm = TRUE)),
                  sep = " - "),
           .names = "{col}_变幅"),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )
write.csv(raw_data6, "基础统计.csv", row.names = FALSE)
print(raw_data6)
```

### 多重比较（图+表）

```{r}
res_anova_spss_list <- list()
res_summary_list <- list()

# file_name <- "2024297.xlsx" 
# 
# if(!file.exists(file_name)) {
#   stop(paste("错误：未找到文件", file_name, "请确保文件在当前工作目录下。"))
# }
# raw_danwei <- read_excel(
#   file_name,
#   sheet = "单位对照表"
# )
# raw_suoxie <-read_excel(
#   file_name,
#   sheet = "英文对照表"
# )
# raw_data1 <- read_excel(file_name)
# raw_data2<- raw_data1 %>%
#   group_by(across(1:2)) %>%
#   summarise(across(everything(),\(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
#             .groups = 'drop')
# raw_data <- raw_data2[, -2]
# first_value <<- colnames(raw_data)[1]
# colnames(raw_data)[1] <- "Group"
# raw_data$Group <- as.factor(raw_data$Group)
# traits <- colnames(raw_data)[-1] 

for(trait in traits) {
  df_sub <- raw_data[, c("Group", trait)]
  colnames(df_sub) <- c("Group", "Value")
  df_sub <- na.omit(df_sub)
  if (!trait %in% colnames(raw_danwei))
    {traitdanwei <- trait
    } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[trait]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      traitdanwei <- paste0(trait, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {traitdanwei <- trait}}
  
  if (!first_value %in% colnames(raw_danwei)) 
  {first_valuedanwei <- first_value
    } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[first_value]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      first_valuedanwei <- paste0(first_value, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {first_valuedanwei <- first_value}}
  
  if (!trait %in% colnames(raw_suoxie)) 
    {traitsuoxie <- trait
    } else {unit_val <- raw_suoxie[[trait]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      traitsuoxie <- paste0(trait, "(", unit_val, ")")
    } else {traitsuoxie <- trait}}
  
  lm_model <- lm(Value ~ Group, data = df_sub)
  spss_table <- NULL
  letters_df <- NULL
  
  model <- aov(Value ~ Group, data = df_sub)
  anova_sum <- summary(model)[[1]]
  spss_table <- data.frame(性状=trait, 来源=c("组间","组内","总数"), 
                           SS=c(anova_sum$`Sum Sq`[1:2], sum(anova_sum$`Sum Sq`)),
                           df=c(anova_sum$`Df`[1:2], sum(anova_sum$`Df`)),
                           MS=c(anova_sum$`Mean Sq`[1:2], NA), F=c(anova_sum$`F value`[1], NA, NA),
                           Sig=c(anova_sum$`Pr(>F)`[1], NA, NA))
  if(anova_sum$`Pr(>F)`[1] < 0.05) {
    duncan <- duncan.test(model, "Group", console=FALSE)
    letters_df <- data.frame(Group = rownames(duncan$groups), groups = duncan$groups$groups)
  } else { letters_df <- data.frame(Group = unique(df_sub$Group), groups = "a") }
  res_anova_spss_list[[trait]] <- spss_table
  
  # --- C. 绘图准备 (略) ---
  stats <- df_sub %>% group_by(Group) %>% summarise(Mean = mean(Value), 
                                                    SE = sd(Value)/ sqrt(length(Value)), .groups='drop')
  plot_data <- merge(stats, letters_df, by="Group")
  plot_data$Trait <- trait
  # **关键修改点：在summary中同时保存 Mean_Formatted 和 groups**
  plot_data$Mean_Formatted <- sprintf("%.2f", plot_data$Mean)
  res_summary_list[[trait]] <- plot_data
  
  final_summary <- do.call(rbind, res_summary_list)

  table_data_mean <- final_summary %>%
  dplyr::select(Group, Trait, Mean_Formatted) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Trait, values_from = Mean_Formatted, names_prefix = "Mean_")

  table_data_groups <- final_summary %>%
  dplyr::select(Group, Trait, groups) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Trait, values_from = groups, names_prefix = "Letter_")

# 合并数据（按 Group 合并）
  table_data_wide <- merge(table_data_mean, table_data_groups, by = "Group")

# 创建最终输出表格，将 Mean 和 Letter 交替排列
  output_cols <- c("Group")
  all_traits <- unique(final_summary$Trait)
  for (trait in all_traits) {
  output_cols <- c(output_cols, paste0("Mean_", trait), paste0("Letter_", trait))}

  table_data <- table_data_wide[, output_cols]
  # 空. 绘制柱状图--------
  p_bar <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Group, y = Mean)) +
    geom_col_pattern(
      aes(pattern_angle = 45), pattern = "stripe", fill = "white", colour = "black",
      pattern_fill = "black", pattern_density = 0.01, pattern_spacing = 0.03, width = 0.4
    ) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Mean, ymax = Mean + SE), width = 0.2) +
    geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = Mean + SE), vjust = -0.5, size = 12, family = font_family, color = "black", fontface = "bold") +
    labs(x = first_valuedanwei, y = traitdanwei, title = NULL) + 
    theme_classic() + 
    theme(
      #text = element_text(family = font_family),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 28, color = "black", face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 28, color = "black", face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "none"
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2)))
  
  plot_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "bar")
  if(!dir.exists(plot_dir)) dir.create(plot_dir)
  
  print(p_bar)
  ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, paste0(traitsuoxie, ".pdf")), p_bar, width = 6,
         height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
} 

# 创建一个空的 list 来存储底部五行
bottom_stats <- list()
# 计算各个性状的统计量
for (trait in all_traits) {
  trait_values <- na.omit(raw_data[[trait]])
  m_val <- mean(trait_values)
  se_val <- sd(trait_values)
  cv_val <- (sd(trait_values) / m_val) * 100
  anova_info <- res_anova_spss_list[[trait]]
  f_stat <- anova_info$F[1] # F值或卡方值
  p_val  <- anova_info$Sig[1] # P值
  f_sig <- case_when(
    p_val < 0.001 ~ "***",
    p_val < 0.01 ~ "**",
    p_val < 0.05 ~ "*",
    TRUE ~ ""
  )
  
  bottom_stats[[trait]] <- data.frame(
    Trait = trait,
    Mean = sprintf("%.2f", m_val),
    SD = sprintf("%.2f", se_val),
    CV = paste0(sprintf("%.2f", cv_val), "%"),
    F_val = paste0(sprintf("%.2f", f_stat), f_sig),
    P_val = sprintf("%.3f", p_val)
  )
}
# --- 2. 构造追加行 ---
# 初始化五行空数据，列数与 table_data 一致
stat_rows <- data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow = 5, ncol = ncol(table_data)))
colnames(stat_rows) <- colnames(table_data)
stat_rows[[1]] <- c("平均值", "标准差", "变异系数", "F", "P")

# 将每个性状的统计量填充到对应的 Mean 列中（字母列留空）
for (i in seq_along(all_traits)) {
  trait <- all_traits[i]
  col_idx <- i * 2 # 指向 Mean_trait 列
  stat_rows[1, col_idx] <- bottom_stats[[trait]]$Mean
  stat_rows[2, col_idx] <- bottom_stats[[trait]]$SD
  stat_rows[3, col_idx] <- bottom_stats[[trait]]$CV
  stat_rows[4, col_idx] <- bottom_stats[[trait]]$F_val
  stat_rows[5, col_idx] <- bottom_stats[[trait]]$P_val
}

# 合并到主表
table_data_final <- rbind(table_data, stat_rows)
colnames(table_data_final)[1] <- first_value
final_output_cols <- c(first_value)
for (trait in all_traits) {
  if (!trait %in% colnames(raw_danwei))
    {traitdanwei <- trait
    } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[trait]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      traitdanwei <- paste0(trait, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {traitdanwei <- trait}}
  
  final_output_cols <- c(final_output_cols, traitdanwei, paste0(trait, "_字母"))
}

colnames(table_data_final) <- final_output_cols

print(table_data_final)
```

### 频次分布直方图——观测值

```{r}

# raw_data4

for(trait in traits) {
  frequent_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "frequency")
  if(!dir.exists(frequent_dir)) dir.create(frequent_dir)
  
    if (!trait %in% colnames(raw_danwei)) 
    {traitdanwei <- trait
      } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[trait]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      traitdanwei <- paste0(trait, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {traitdanwei <- trait}}
  
  if (!first_value %in% colnames(raw_danwei)) 
  {first_valuedanwei <- first_value
    } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[first_value]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      first_valuedanwei <- paste0(first_value, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {first_valuedanwei <- first_value}}
  
  if (!trait %in% colnames(raw_suoxie)) 
  {traitsuoxie <- trait
    } else {unit_val <- raw_suoxie[[trait]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      traitsuoxie <- paste0(trait, "(", unit_val, ")")
    } else {traitsuoxie <- trait}}
  
  df_sub1 <- raw_data4[, c("Group", trait)]
  colnames(df_sub1) <- c("Group", "Value")
  df_sub1 <- na.omit(df_sub1)
  
  mean_val <- mean(df_sub1$Value)
  sd_val   <- sd(df_sub1$Value)
  n_obs    <- nrow(df_sub1)
  
  n_bins     <- nclass.Sturges(df_sub1$Value) 
  min_val    <- min(df_sub1$Value)
  max_val    <- max(df_sub1$Value)
  
  # 计算箱宽
  bin_width  <- (max_val - min_val) / n_bins
  
  # 生成分箱的边界序列 (即每个箱子的最小值和最大值位置)
  # 使用 seq 生成从最小值到最大值的等差数列
  breaks_seq <- seq(from = min_val, to = max_val, length.out = n_bins + 1)
  
  # (可选) 确保覆盖最大值，防止浮点数精度问题导致最右侧数据丢失
  if(max(breaks_seq) < max_val) {
    breaks_seq[length(breaks_seq)] <- max_val
  }
  
  # --- 2. 绘图 ---
  p_hist <- ggplot(df_sub1, aes(x = Value)) +
    
    # A. 绘制带斜线的直方图 
    # --- 修改部分 2: 使用 breaks 参数 ---
    geom_histogram_pattern(
      aes(y = after_stat(count)), 
      breaks = breaks_seq,     # <--- 关键修改：使用显式定义的边界，而不是 binwidth
      
      # 颜色设置
      fill = "white",          
      color = "black",         
      
      # 纹理设置
      pattern = "stripe",      
      pattern_angle = -45,     
      pattern_density = 0.1,   
      pattern_spacing = 0.02,  
      pattern_fill = "black",  
      pattern_colour = "black",
      linewidth = 0.6
    ) +
    
    # B. 绘制正态分布拟合曲线
    stat_function(
      fun = function(x) dnorm(x, mean = mean_val, sd = sd_val) * n_obs * bin_width,
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 1.5
    ) +
    
    # --- 修改部分 3: 设置 X 轴刻度与分箱边界对齐 ---
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = breaks_seq,                  # 刻度位置
      labels = sprintf("%.1f", breaks_seq)  # 强制保留1位小数 (如 10.0)
    ) +
    
    # D. 标签设置
    labs(x = traitdanwei, y = "频次") +
    
    # E. 主题设置
    theme_classic() + 
    theme(
      ##text = element_text(family = font_family),
      
      # --- 修改部分 4: 调整 X 轴文字角度防止重叠 ---
      # 因为显示了所有边界，数字会变密，通常需要旋转 45 度
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black", angle = 45, hjust = 1, margin = margin(t = 5)),
      
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 5)),
      
      # 坐标轴标题
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 10)),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 10)),
      
      # 去除图例
      legend.position = "none",
      
      # 坐标轴线加粗
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8)
    )
  print(p_hist)
  # 保存图片
  ggsave(file.path(frequent_dir, paste0(traitsuoxie , "_guance.png")), 
         p_hist, width = 3, height = 2)
}
```

### 频次分布直方图——平均值

```{r}

# raw_data

for(trait in traits) { 
  frequent_dir1 <- file.path(output_dir, "frequency_pinjun")
  if(!dir.exists(frequent_dir1)) dir.create(frequent_dir1)
  
  if (!trait %in% colnames(raw_danwei)) 
    {traitdanwei <- trait
      } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[trait]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      traitdanwei <- paste0(trait, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {traitdanwei <- trait}}
  
  if (!first_value %in% colnames(raw_danwei)) 
  {first_valuedanwei <- first_value
    } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[first_value]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      first_valuedanwei <- paste0(first_value, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {first_valuedanwei <- first_value}}
  
  if (!trait %in% colnames(raw_suoxie)) 
  {traitsuoxie <- trait
    } else {unit_val <- raw_suoxie[[trait]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      traitsuoxie <- paste0(trait, "(", unit_val, ")")
    } else {traitsuoxie <- trait}}
  
  df_sub <- raw_data[, c("Group", trait)]
  colnames(df_sub) <- c("Group", "Value")
  df_sub <- na.omit(df_sub)
  
  mean_val <- mean(df_sub$Value)
  sd_val   <- sd(df_sub$Value)
  n_obs    <- nrow(df_sub)
  
  # --- 修改部分 1: 显式计算分箱的边界 (Breaks) ---
  n_bins     <- nclass.Sturges(df_sub$Value) 
  min_val    <- min(df_sub$Value)
  max_val    <- max(df_sub$Value)
  
  # 计算箱宽
  bin_width  <- (max_val - min_val) / n_bins
  
  # 生成分箱的边界序列 (即每个箱子的最小值和最大值位置)
  # 使用 seq 生成从最小值到最大值的等差数列
  breaks_seq <- seq(from = min_val, to = max_val, length.out = n_bins + 1)
  
  # (可选) 确保覆盖最大值，防止浮点数精度问题导致最右侧数据丢失
  if(max(breaks_seq) < max_val) {
    breaks_seq[length(breaks_seq)] <- max_val
  }
  
  # --- 2. 绘图 ---
  p_hist <- ggplot(df_sub, aes(x = Value)) +
    
    # A. 绘制带斜线的直方图 
    # --- 修改部分 2: 使用 breaks 参数 ---
    geom_histogram_pattern(
      aes(y = after_stat(count)), 
      breaks = breaks_seq,     # <--- 关键修改：使用显式定义的边界，而不是 binwidth
      
      # 颜色设置
      fill = "white",          
      color = "black",         
      
      # 纹理设置
      pattern = "stripe",      
      pattern_angle = -45,     
      pattern_density = 0.1,   
      pattern_spacing = 0.02,  
      pattern_fill = "black",  
      pattern_colour = "black",
      linewidth = 0.6
    ) +
    
    # B. 绘制正态分布拟合曲线
    stat_function(
      fun = function(x) dnorm(x, mean = mean_val, sd = sd_val) * n_obs * bin_width,
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 1.5
    ) +
    
    # --- 修改部分 3: 设置 X 轴刻度与分箱边界对齐 ---
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = breaks_seq,                  # 刻度位置
      labels = sprintf("%.1f", breaks_seq)  # 强制保留1位小数 (如 10.0)
    ) +
    
    labs(
      x = traitdanwei,
      y = "频次") +
    
    # E. 主题设置
    theme_classic() + 
    theme(
      ##text = element_text(family = font_family),
      
      # --- 修改部分 4: 调整 X 轴文字角度防止重叠 ---
      # 因为显示了所有边界，数字会变密，通常需要旋转 45 度
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black", angle = 45, hjust = 1, margin = margin(t = 5)),
      
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 5)),
      
      # 坐标轴标题
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 10)),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 10)),
      
      # 去除图例
      legend.position = "none",
      
      # 坐标轴线加粗
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8)
    )
  print(p_hist)
  # 保存图片
  ggsave(file.path(frequent_dir1, paste0(traitsuoxie, "_pingjun.pdf")), 
         p_hist, width = 6, height = 4.5)
  }
```

### 箱线图——观测值

```{r}

# raw_data4
my_base_colors <- c("#6A76A8", "#DF7A76", "#82B0D2", "#FFBE7A", "#FA7F6F")
my_colors <- rep(my_base_colors, length.out = 8000)

for(trait in traits) { 
  df_sub1 <- raw_data4[, c("Group", trait)]
  colnames(df_sub1) <- c("Group", "Value")
  df_sub1 <- na.omit(df_sub1)
  
  if (!trait %in% colnames(raw_danwei)) 
    {traitdanwei <- trait
      } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[trait]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      traitdanwei <- paste0(trait, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {traitdanwei <- trait}}
  
  if (!first_value %in% colnames(raw_danwei)) 
  {first_valuedanwei <- first_value
    } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[first_value]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      first_valuedanwei <- paste0(first_value, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {first_valuedanwei <- first_value}}
  
  if (!trait %in% colnames(raw_suoxie)) 
  {traitsuoxie <- trait
    } else {unit_val <- raw_suoxie[[trait]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      traitsuoxie <- paste0(trait, "(", unit_val, ")")
    } else {traitsuoxie <- trait}}
  
    # 1. 获取最大值，用于确定上限
  max_val <- max(df_sub1$Value, na.rm = TRUE)
  min_val <- min(df_sub1$Value, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 2. 设定Y轴起始点：
  #    如果是生物学性状通常从 0 开始。如果不希望从0开始，可以将下面的 0 改为 min_val * 0.9 等
  y_start <- min_val * 0.99
  
  # 3. 设定Y轴上限：比最大值多 10% 空间，防止离群点被切掉或顶到图边缘
  y_end <- max_val * 1.01 
  
  # 4. 生成漂亮的刻度断点 (pretty函数会自动生成也就是包含最小值和最大值范围的合适刻度)
  my_breaks <- pretty(c(y_start, y_end))
  
  # 确保最大刻度能包住数据最大值，如果pretty生成的最大值不够，就手动扩展
  if(max(my_breaks) < max_val) {
    my_breaks <- c(my_breaks, max(my_breaks) + diff(my_breaks)[1])
  }
  
  p_box <- ggplot(df_sub1, aes(x = Group, y = Value, fill = Group, group = Group))+
    # 1. 绘制误差条
    stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, linewidth = 0.6) + 
    # 2. 绘制箱线图
    geom_boxplot(
      width = 0.55,           
      outlier.shape = 1,      
      outlier.size = 2,       
      outlier.stroke = 0.8,   
      linewidth = 0.6,        
      color = "black"         
    ) +
    # 3. 颜色设置
    scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
    
    # --- 新增核心修改：Y轴设置 ---
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = my_breaks,                      # 使用我们要的刻度
      limits = c(min(my_breaks), max(my_breaks)), # 强制限制范围
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))    # 关键：mult=c(0, ...) 让底部不留空隙，紧贴X轴
    ) +
    # 4. 标签设置
    labs(
      x = first_valuedanwei,
      y = traitdanwei
    ) +
    # 5. 主题设置
    theme_classic() + 
    theme(
      #text = element_text(family = "sans"),
      
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 5)),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 5)),
      
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 10)),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 10)),
      
      legend.position = "none",
      
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8)
    )
  print(p_box)
  # 保存箱线图
  box_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "xiangxiantu")
  if(!dir.exists(box_dir)) dir.create(box_dir)
  
  ggsave(file.path(box_dir, paste0(traitsuoxie, "_guance.png")), 
         p_box, width = 4, height = 5)
  }
```

### 箱线图——平均值

```{r}

# raw_data
my_base_colors <- c("#6A76A8", "#DF7A76", "#82B0D2", "#FFBE7A", "#FA7F6F")
my_colors <- rep(my_base_colors, length.out = 8000)

for(trait in traits) { 
  df_sub <- raw_data[, c("Group", trait)]
  colnames(df_sub) <- c("Group", "Value")
  df_sub <- na.omit(df_sub)
  
  if (!trait %in% colnames(raw_danwei)) 
    {traitdanwei <- trait
      } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[trait]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      traitdanwei <- paste0(trait, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {traitdanwei <- trait}}
  
  if (!first_value %in% colnames(raw_danwei)) 
  {first_valuedanwei <- first_value
    } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[first_value]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      first_valuedanwei <- paste0(first_value, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {first_valuedanwei <- first_value}}
  
  if (!trait %in% colnames(raw_suoxie)) 
  {traitsuoxie <- trait
    } else {unit_val <- raw_suoxie[[trait]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      traitsuoxie <- paste0(trait, "(", unit_val, ")")
    } else {traitsuoxie <- trait}}
  
  # 1. 获取最大值，用于确定上限
  max_val <- max(df_sub$Value, na.rm = TRUE)
  min_val <- min(df_sub$Value, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 2. 设定Y轴起始点：
  #    如果是生物学性状通常从 0 开始。如果不希望从0开始，可以将下面的 0 改为 min_val * 0.9 等
  y_start <- min_val * 0.99
  
  # 3. 设定Y轴上限：比最大值多 10% 空间，防止离群点被切掉或顶到图边缘
  y_end <- max_val * 1.01 
  
  # 4. 生成漂亮的刻度断点 (pretty函数会自动生成也就是包含最小值和最大值范围的合适刻度)
  my_breaks <- pretty(c(y_start, y_end))
  
  # 确保最大刻度能包住数据最大值，如果pretty生成的最大值不够，就手动扩展
  if(max(my_breaks) < max_val) {
    my_breaks <- c(my_breaks, max(my_breaks) + diff(my_breaks)[1])
  }
  
  p_box <- ggplot(df_sub, aes(x = Group, y = Value, fill = Group, group = Group))+
    # 1. 绘制误差条
    stat_boxplot(geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, linewidth = 0.6) + 
    # 2. 绘制箱线图
    geom_boxplot(
      width = 0.55,           
      outlier.shape = 1,      
      outlier.size = 2,       
      outlier.stroke = 0.8,   
      linewidth = 0.6,        
      color = "black"         
    ) +
    # 3. 颜色设置
    scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
    
    # --- 新增核心修改：Y轴设置 ---
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = my_breaks,                      # 使用我们要的刻度
      limits = c(min(my_breaks), max(my_breaks)), # 强制限制范围
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))    # 关键：mult=c(0, ...) 让底部不留空隙，紧贴X轴
    ) +
    # 4. 标签设置
    labs(
      x = first_valuedanwei,
      y = traitdanwei
    ) +
    # 5. 主题设置
    theme_classic() + 
    theme(
      #text = element_text(family = font_family),
      
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 5)),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 5)),
      
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 10)),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 10)),
      
      legend.position = "none",
      
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.8)
    )
  print(p_box)
  # 保存箱线图
  box_dir1 <- file.path(output_dir, "xiangxiantu_pinjun")
  if(!dir.exists(box_dir1)) dir.create(box_dir1)
  
  ggsave(file.path(box_dir1, paste0(traitsuoxie, "_pingjun.pdf")), 
         p_box, width = 4, height = 5, device = cairo_pdf)
  }
```

### QQ图

```{r}

# raw_data

for(trait in traits) { 
  df_sub <- raw_data[, c("Group", trait)]
  colnames(df_sub) <- c("Group", "Value")
  df_sub <- na.omit(df_sub)
  
  if (!trait %in% colnames(raw_danwei)) 
    {traitdanwei <- trait
      } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[trait]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      traitdanwei <- paste0(trait, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {traitdanwei <- trait}}
  
  if (!first_value %in% colnames(raw_danwei)) 
  {first_valuedanwei <- first_value
    } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[first_value]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      first_valuedanwei <- paste0(first_value, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {first_valuedanwei <- first_value}}
  
  if (!trait %in% colnames(raw_suoxie)) 
  {traitsuoxie <- trait
    } else {unit_val <- raw_suoxie[[trait]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      traitsuoxie <- paste0(trait, "(", unit_val, ")")
    } else {traitsuoxie <- trait}}
  
  fit <- aov(Value ~ Group, data = df_sub)
  p_qq <- ggqqplot(residuals(fit)) +
    labs(x = "理论分位数", y = "残差", title = trait) +
    theme(
      #text = element_text(family = font_family, size = 20),
      text = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, margin = margin(t = 8)),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, margin = margin(r = 8)),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,  # 标题居中
                                color = "black",  # 标题颜色
                                size = 20), 
      plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 5, l = 10, unit = "pt")
    )
  print(p_qq)
  
  qq_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "QQ")
  if(!dir.exists(qq_dir)) dir.create(qq_dir)

  ggsave(file.path(qq_dir, paste0(traitsuoxie, "_residuals_qq.pdf")), p_qq, width = 5, height = 4, device = cairo_pdf)
  }
```

### 相关性分析——表

```{r}

# raw_data4

cor_data <- raw_data4[, -c(1:2)]
cor_res <- rcorr(as.matrix(cor_data), type = "pearson")
r_mat <- cor_res$r
p_mat <- cor_res$P
formatted_cor <- matrix("", nrow = nrow(r_mat), ncol = ncol(r_mat))
for(i in 1:nrow(r_mat)) {
  for(j in 1:ncol(r_mat)) {
    if(i > j) {
      sig <- case_when(
        is.na(p_mat[i,j]) ~ "",
        p_mat[i,j] < 0.001 ~ "***",
        p_mat[i,j] < 0.01 ~ "**",
        p_mat[i,j] < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ "")
      formatted_cor[i,j] <- paste0(sprintf("%.2f", r_mat[i,j]), sig)
    } 
  }
}
rownames(formatted_cor) <- rownames(r_mat)
colnames(formatted_cor) <- colnames(r_mat)
formatted_cor_df <- cbind(性状 = rownames(formatted_cor), as.data.frame(formatted_cor))
formatted_cor_df <- formatted_cor_df[-1, -ncol(formatted_cor_df)]
print(formatted_cor_df)
```

### 相关性分析——图1

```{r}
# raw_data1

cor_data <- raw_data1[, -c(1:3)]

common_cols <- intersect(colnames(cor_data), colnames(raw_suoxie))
colnames(cor_data)[colnames(cor_data) %in% common_cols] <- 
  paste0(raw_suoxie[1, common_cols])

cor_res <- rcorr(as.matrix(cor_data), type = "pearson")
r_mat <- cor_res$r
p_mat <- cor_res$P

# 转换为长格式
cordata_long <- melt(r_mat)
colnames(cordata_long) <- c("Row", "Col", "value") # 明确命名为行和列
pdata_long <- melt(p_mat)
pdata_long$value[is.na(pdata_long$value)] <- 1 
colnames(pdata_long) <- c("Row", "Col", "p_val")

# 获取变量名的原始顺序
vars <- colnames(r_mat)

plot_data <- cordata_long %>%
  left_join(pdata_long, by = c("Row", "Col")) %>%
  mutate(
    # 将行列转换为因子，保持原始顺序
    Row = factor(Row, levels = vars),
    Col = factor(Col, levels = vars),
    
    # 获取数值索引用于判断区域
    Row_Idx = as.numeric(Row),
    Col_Idx = as.numeric(Col),
    
    # 核心逻辑：定义区域
    # 矩阵坐标中：行索引 > 列索引 = 下三角 (因为行是Y轴，列是X轴)
    # 注意：在ggplot中，Y轴通常是从下往上，但我们会反转Y轴使其从上往下
    Region = case_when(
      Row_Idx == Col_Idx ~ "Diag",    # 对角线
      Row_Idx > Col_Idx ~ "Lower",    # 下三角 (行号大，在矩阵下方)
      Row_Idx < Col_Idx ~ "Upper"     # 上三角 (行号小，在矩阵上方)
    ),
    
    # 显著性标记
    Stars = case_when(
      p_val < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_val < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p_val < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    
    # 数值标签格式化
    Label_Text = sprintf("%.2f", value)
  )
# 这是一个不依赖 ggforce 包的纯几何实现
n_vars <- length(vars)
get_ellipse_poly <- function(data) {
  do.call(rbind, lapply(1:nrow(data), function(i) {
    row <- data$Row_Idx[i] # Y轴中心 (将被反转)
    col <- data$Col_Idx[i] # X轴中心
    r <- data$value[i]
    
    # 椭圆参数
    theta <- seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = 50)
    radius <- 0.45 # 单元格内半径
    
    # 根据相关性强度压扁椭圆 (r越大越扁)
    minor_axis <- radius * (1 - abs(r))
    major_axis <- radius
    
    # 基础形状
    x_base <- major_axis * cos(theta)
    y_base <- minor_axis * sin(theta)
    
    # 旋转角度：正相关45度，负相关-45度
    angle <- ifelse(r > 0, pi/4, -pi/4)
    
    # 旋转矩阵应用
    x_rot <- x_base * cos(angle) - y_base * sin(angle)
    y_rot <- x_base * sin(angle) + y_base * cos(angle)
    y_center <- n_vars - row + 1
    data.frame(
      group_id = paste(row, col, sep = "-"),
      x = col + x_rot,        # X 轴正常 (Col 1 在左边)
      y = y_center + y_rot,   # Y 轴反转 (Row 1 在顶端)
      value = r,
      Row = data$Row[i],
      Col = data$Col[i]
    )
  }))
}

data_lower <- plot_data %>% filter(Region == "Lower")
data_upper <- plot_data %>% filter(Region == "Upper")
data_diag  <- plot_data %>% filter(Region == "Diag")

# 生成上三角的椭圆数据
ellipse_data <- get_ellipse_poly(data_upper)

# B. 绘图参数设置 --------------------------------------------------------------
base_size <- 18
# 定义颜色：墨绿色 - 白色 - 紫红色
color_low  <- "#276419" # 类似图片中的深绿色
color_mid  <- "white"
color_high <- "#8E0152" # 类似图片中的深紫红色

# C. 绘制图形 ------------------------------------------------------------------
p_corr <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Col, y = Row)) + # X轴放列，Y轴放行
  
  # 1. 基础网格 (灰色边框，无填充)
  geom_tile(fill = NA, color = "grey85", linewidth = 0.5) +
  
  # 2. 上三角：椭圆 (使用 geom_polygon)
  # 填充色映射相关性，无边框
  geom_polygon(data = ellipse_data, 
               aes(x = x, y = y, group = group_id, fill = value), 
               color = NA) + 
  
  #    上三角：星号 (黑色，位于椭圆中心)
  geom_text(data = data_upper, aes(x = Col, y = Row, label = Stars), 
            color = "black", size = 6, vjust = 0.75) + 
  
  # 3. 下三角：数值 (颜色映射相关性)
  geom_text(data = data_lower, aes(x = Col, y = Row, label = Label_Text, color = value,, alpha = abs(value)), 
            size = 4.5,fontface = "bold") +
  
  # 4. 对角线：变量名
  geom_text(data = data_diag, aes(x = Col, y = Row, label = Row), 
            size = 4.5,color = "black") +
  
  # 5. 颜色标尺设置 (统一用于填充和文字颜色)
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = color_low, mid = color_mid, high = color_high, 
    midpoint = 0, limit = c(-1, 1), space = "Lab", name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low = color_low, mid = "grey30", high = color_high, # 中间值稍微加深一点灰色以保证文字可读
    midpoint = 0, limit = c(-1, 1), space = "Lab", name = NULL
  ) +
  
  scale_alpha(range = c(0, 1), guide = "none") +
  # 6. 坐标系调整
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(vars)) + # 反转Y轴
  scale_x_discrete(position = "bottom") +
  coord_fixed() + 
 
  # 7. 主题与细节
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    #text = element_text(family = font_family, size = base_size),
    text = element_text(size = base_size),
    # 坐标轴文本
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle =30,hjust = 1, vjust = 1, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_blank(), # 隐藏轴标题
    
    # 去除默认网格 (使用 geom_tile 代替)
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    
    # 图例位置
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.margin = margin(l = 5, r = 5),
    legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    legend.ticks = element_blank()         ### 关键：全局去掉图例刻度
  ) +
  # 8. 图例样式 (细长条)
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      title = NULL,
      draw.ulim = FALSE, 
      draw.llim = FALSE,
      ticks = FALSE,
      # 高度占绘图区的 90%
      barheight = unit(0.9, "npc"), 
      barwidth = unit(0.03, "npc")
    ),
    color = "none", # 隐藏文字颜色的独立图例
    alpha = "none"  # 隐藏透明度图例
  )
print(p_corr)
# D. 保存图片
cor_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "correlation")
if(!dir.exists(cor_dir)) dir.create(cor_dir)

ggsave(file.path(cor_dir, "Correlation_Analysis_Ellipse.pdf"), 
       p_corr,width = 10, height = 9, 
       device = cairo_pdf) 
```

### 相关性分析——图2

```{r}
# raw_data4


cor_data <- raw_data4[, -c(1:2)]
cor_res <- rcorr(as.matrix(cor_data), type = "pearson")
r_mat <- cor_res$r
p_mat <- cor_res$P
# 转换为长格式
cordata_long <- melt(r_mat)
colnames(cordata_long) <- c("Row", "Col", "value") # 明确命名为行和列
pdata_long <- melt(p_mat)
pdata_long$value[is.na(pdata_long$value)] <- 1 
colnames(pdata_long) <- c("Row", "Col", "p_val")

# 获取变量名的原始顺序
vars <- colnames(r_mat)

# 合并数据并处理坐标逻辑
plot_data <- cordata_long %>%
  left_join(pdata_long, by = c("Row", "Col")) %>%
  mutate(
    # 将行列转换为因子，保持原始顺序
    Row = factor(Row, levels = vars),
    Col = factor(Col, levels = vars),
    
    # 获取数值索引用于判断区域
    Row_Idx = as.numeric(Row),
    Col_Idx = as.numeric(Col),
    
    # 核心逻辑：定义区域
    # 矩阵坐标中：行索引 > 列索引 = 下三角 (因为行是Y轴，列是X轴)
    # 注意：在ggplot中，Y轴通常是从下往上，但我们会反转Y轴使其从上往下
    Region = case_when(
      Row_Idx == Col_Idx ~ "Diag",    # 对角线
      Row_Idx > Col_Idx ~ "Lower",    # 下三角 (行号大，在矩阵下方)
      Row_Idx < Col_Idx ~ "Upper"     # 上三角 (行号小，在矩阵上方)
    ),
    
    # 显著性标记
    Stars = case_when(
      p_val < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_val < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p_val < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    
    # 数值标签格式化
    Label_Text = sprintf("%.2f", value)
  )

# 分拆数据以分别绘制图层
data_lower <- plot_data %>% filter(Region == "Lower")
data_upper <- plot_data %>% filter(Region == "Upper")
data_diag  <- plot_data %>% filter(Region == "Diag")

# B. 绘图参数设置 --------------------------------------------------------------
# 基础字体大小
base_size <- 18

# C. 绘制图形 ------------------------------------------------------------------
p_corr <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Col, y = Row)) + # X轴放列，Y轴放行
  
  # 1. 基础网格 (灰色边框，无填充)
  geom_tile(fill = NA, color = "grey85", linewidth = 0.5) +
  
  # 2. 下三角：圆圈 (Fill映射颜色，Size映射绝对值)
  geom_point(data = data_lower, aes(size = abs(value), fill = value), 
             shape = 21, color = "white") + # 去掉圆圈边框，只看填充色
  
  #    下三角：星号 (黑色，对比度更高)
  geom_text(data = data_lower, aes(label = Stars), 
            color = "black", size = 9, vjust = 0.75) + 
  
  # 3. 上三角：数值 (Color映射颜色，Alpha映射透明度)
  geom_text(data = data_upper, aes(label = Label_Text, color = value, alpha = abs(value)), 
            size = 4 , family = font_family, fontface = "bold") +
  
  # 4. 对角线：变量名 (直接绘制，无特殊背景)
  geom_text(data = data_diag, aes(label = Row), 
            size = 1.5, family = font_family, color = "black") +
  
  # 5. 标尺设置
  # 填充色 (用于圆圈)
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#3B6D9D", mid = "white", high = "#B2182B", 
    midpoint = 0, limit = c(-1, 1), space = "Lab", name = NULL
  ) +
  # 文字颜色 (用于数值) - 保持与填充色一致
  scale_color_gradient2(
    low = "#3B6D9D", mid = "grey30", high = "#B2182B", 
    midpoint = 0, limit = c(-1, 1), space = "Lab", name = NULL
  ) +
  # 圆圈大小 (调大上限，使相关性高的圆填满格子)
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 12), guide = "none") + 
  # 透明度 (用于上三角数值，相关性越低越淡，但最低保留 0.4 可读)
  scale_alpha(range = c(0, 1), guide = "none") +
  
  # 6. 坐标系调整
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(vars)) + # 反转Y轴，使第一个变量在最上方
  scale_x_discrete(position = "bottom") +
  coord_fixed() + # 强制正方形
  
  # 7. 主题与细节
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    #text = element_text(family = font_family, size = base_size),
    text = element_text(size = base_size),
    # 坐标轴文本
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_blank(), # 隐藏轴标题
    
    # 去除默认网格 (使用 geom_tile 代替)
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    
    # 图例位置
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.margin = margin(l = 5, r = 5),
    legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    legend.ticks = element_blank()
  ) +
  
  # 8. 图例样式 (极致拉长)
  guides(
    fill = guide_colorbar(
      title = NULL,
      draw.ulim = FALSE, 
      draw.llim = FALSE,
      ticks = FALSE,
      # 高度占绘图区的 100% (尽量等长)
      barheight = unit(0.84, "npc"), 
      barwidth = unit(0.04, "npc")
    ),
    color = "none", # 隐藏文字颜色的独立图例
    alpha = "none"  # 隐藏透明度图例
  )
print(p_corr)
# D. 保存图片
cor_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "correlation")
if(!dir.exists(cor_dir)) dir.create(cor_dir)

ggsave(file.path(cor_dir, "Correlation_Analysis_Final.pdf"), 
       p_corr, width = 10, height = 9, device = cairo_pdf)
```

### 主成分分析 (PCA)

```{r}

# raw_data5

clean_data_for_pca <- raw_data5[, -1]  # 移除编号列
pca_result <- prcomp(clean_data_for_pca, scale. = TRUE) 

first_var_signs <- sign(pca_result$rotation[1, ])
first_var_signs[first_var_signs == 0] <- 1
pca_result$rotation <- sweep(pca_result$rotation, 2, first_var_signs, "*")
pca_result$x <- sweep(pca_result$x, 2, first_var_signs, "*")

# 提取特征值与贡献率
eig_val <- pca_result$sdev^2
var_percent <- eig_val / sum(eig_val) * 100
cum_percent <- cumsum(var_percent)

# 确定提取的主成分个数 (特征值>1 或 累计贡献率>85%，这里默认取特征值>1)
num_pc <-  which(cum_percent > 85)[1]
if(num_pc < 2) num_pc <- 2 # 至少取2个以便展示

# 提取特征向量 (Eigenvectors)
loadings <- pca_result$rotation[, 1:num_pc] %*% diag(pca_result$sdev[1:num_pc])
colnames(loadings) <- paste0("PC", 1:num_pc)
# --- 生成类似图5 (表3) 的PCA特征值表 ---
pca_info_table <- data.frame(
  性状 = rownames(loadings),
  loadings, # 载荷
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
pca_info_table$共同度 <- rowSums(loadings^2)
pca_info_table$共同度 <-  sprintf("%.3f", pca_info_table$共同度)
# 添加特征值等信息行 (需要转置合并，稍微复杂一点，为了格式美观)
extra_info <- matrix(NA, nrow=3, ncol=ncol(pca_info_table))
extra_info[,1] <- c("特征值", "方差贡献率 (%)", "累计贡献率 (%)")
extra_info[,2:(num_pc+1)] <- rbind(round(eig_val[1:num_pc], 2), 
                                   round(var_percent[1:num_pc], 2), 
                                   round(cum_percent[1:num_pc], 2))
pca_output_table <- rbind(pca_info_table, 
                  setNames(as.data.frame(extra_info), names(pca_info_table)))
pca_rounded <- pca_output_table
# 载荷部分（除第一列外）保留3位
for (j in 2:(num_pc + 1)) {
  col_vals <- pca_rounded[[j]]
  # 尝试转数值
  num_vals <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(col_vals))
  if (!all(is.na(num_vals))) {
    # 前 (nrow - 3) 行是载荷 → 3位小数
    n_traits <- nrow(pca_rounded) - 3
    pca_rounded[1:n_traits, j] <- sprintf("%.3f", num_vals[1:n_traits])
    # 最后3行：特征值、贡献率、累计贡献率 → 3位小数
    pca_rounded[(n_traits + 1):(n_traits + 3), j] <- sprintf("%.3f", num_vals[(n_traits + 1):(n_traits + 3)])
  }
}
print(pca_rounded)
```

### 主成分分析图

```{r}
{edge_exe <- "C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft/Edge/Application/msedge.exe"
Sys.setenv(CHROMOTE_CHROME = edge_exe)

PCA_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "PCA")
if(!dir.exists(PCA_dir)) dir.create(PCA_dir)

smart_pca_visualize_save <- function(pca_res, var_pct) {
  scores <- as.data.frame(pca_res$x)
  n_samples <- nrow(scores)
  n_pcs <- ncol(scores)
  cat(sprintf("检测到数据: %d 个样本, %d 个主成分。\n", n_samples, n_pcs))
  color_palettes <- list(
    c("#000000", "#000000", "#000000"), 
    c("#E6B450", "#8B4513", "#ADD8E6"), 
    c("#556B2F", "#007000", "#90C999"),
    c("#CD5C5C", "#8B0000", "#FFDAB9"), 
    c("#9370DB", "#4B0082", "#D8BFD8"),
    c("#4682B4", "#000080", "#E6E6FA")
  )
  # 用于收集结果以便在 RStudio 显示
  plot_list <- list()
  # --- 4. 逻辑分流与绘图 ---
  #改图大小 ------------------
  if (n_pcs == 2) {
    cat("主成分为 2 列，生成 2D 图...\n")
    p <- plot_pca_2d_core(pca_res, var_pct, dims = c(1, 2), colors = color_palettes[[1]])
    print(p)
    file_name <- file.path(PCA_dir, "PCA_2D_PC1-PC2.html")
    saveWidget(p, file_name, selfcontained = TRUE)
    pdf_file <- file.path(PCA_dir, "PCA_2D_PC1-PC2.pdf")
    webshot2::webshot(
      url = file_name, 
      file = pdf_file,
      selector = ".html-widget",  
      #vwidth = 800, 
      #vheight = 600, 
      delay = 1,
      zoom = 2
    )
    system2("pdfcrop", args = c(shQuote(pdf_file), shQuote(pdf_file)))
    cat(sprintf("  -> 已保存: %s\n", file_name))
    return(p)
  } 
  #tryCatch({webshot2::webshot(url = normalizePath(html_name), file = pdf_name, vwidth = 1200, vheight = 900, delay = 0.5)cat(sprintf("  -> 已保存 pdf : %s\n", pdf_name))}, error = function(e) {cat(sprintf("  -> [错误] 2D pdf 保存失败: %s\n", e$message))})
  # === 情况 B: 3个及以上主成分 -> 画 3D 图 (多图策略) ===
  else {
    # 计算需要画几张图
    # 比如 7 列: ceiling(7/3) = 3 张图
    num_plots <- ceiling(n_pcs / 3)
    
    for (i in 1:num_plots) {
      if (i < num_plots) {
        current_dims <- c((i - 1) * 3 + 1, (i - 1) * 3 + 2, (i - 1) * 3 + 3)
      } else {
        current_dims <- c(n_pcs - 2, n_pcs - 1, n_pcs)
      }
      # 选取颜色 (循环使用)
      color_idx <- (i - 1) %% length(color_palettes) + 1
      current_colors <- color_palettes[[color_idx]]
      
      dims_label <- paste(current_dims, collapse = "-")
      # 调用绘图核心
      p <- plot_pca_3d_core(pca_res, var_pct, dims = current_dims, colors = current_colors)
      print(p)
      # 保存文件
      file_name <- file.path(PCA_dir, paste0("PCA_3D_Part", i, "_PC", dims_label, ".html"))
      saveWidget(p, file_name, selfcontained = TRUE)
      pdf_file <- file.path(PCA_dir, paste0("PCA_3D_Part", i, "_PC", dims_label, ".pdf"))
      webshot2::webshot(
        url = file_name, 
        file = pdf_file, 
        vwidth = 1200, 
        vheight = 900, 
        delay = 2,
        zoom = 2
      )
      system2("pdfcrop", args = c(shQuote(pdf_file), shQuote(pdf_file)))
      plot_list[[i]] <- p
    }
    
    cat("所有图表处理完毕。\n")
    return(htmltools::tagList(plot_list))
  }
}

plot_pca_3d_core <- function(pca_res, var_pct, dims, colors) {
  
  point_col <- colors[1]; arrow_col <- colors[2]; ellip_col <- colors[3]
  
  # 根据 dims 提取特定的3列数据
  # 因为主函数逻辑保证了 dims 肯定是3个有效整数(如 5,6,7)，这里直接取即可
  scores_subset <- as.data.frame(pca_res$x[, dims])
  rot_subset <- as.data.frame(pca_res$rotation[, dims])
  
  colnames(scores_subset) <- c("X", "Y", "Z")
  colnames(rot_subset) <- c("X", "Y", "Z")
  
  # 下角标格式化
  format_subscripts <- function(x) {
    sapply(x, function(s) {
      if(grepl("^[A-Z][A-Z0-9]+$", s)) {
        paste0(substr(s, 1, 1), "<sub>", substr(s, 2, nchar(s)), "</sub>")
      } else { s }
    })
  }
  raw_names <- rownames(rot_subset)
  formatted_names <- format_subscripts(raw_names)
  
  # 比例缩放
  r_scores <- max(abs(scores_subset))
  r_loadings <- max(abs(rot_subset))
  scale_factor <- (r_scores / r_loadings) * 0.85
  loadings_scaled <- rot_subset * scale_factor
  
  # 椭球计算 (对应维度的 SD)
  sd_vec <- pca_res$sdev[dims]
  theta <- seq(0, 2*pi, length.out=30)
  phi <- seq(0, pi, length.out=15)
  grd <- expand.grid(theta=theta, phi=phi)
  x_ell <- 2 * sd_vec[1] * cos(grd$theta) * sin(grd$phi)
  y_ell <- 2 * sd_vec[2] * sin(grd$theta) * sin(grd$phi)
  z_ell <- 2 * sd_vec[3] * cos(grd$phi)
  
  x_mat <- matrix(x_ell, nrow=length(theta))
  y_mat <- matrix(y_ell, nrow=length(theta))
  z_mat <- matrix(z_ell, nrow=length(theta))
  
  # 轴标签
  ax_labs <- paste0("PC", dims, " (", round(var_pct[dims], 2), "%)")
  
  # 绘图配置
  axis_template <- list(showgrid = TRUE, gridcolor = "#d9d9d9", backgroundcolor = "white",
                        zerolinecolor = "#999999", titlefont = list(family = "Times New Roman", size = 14))
  
  p <- plot_ly() %>%
    add_surface(x = x_mat, y = y_mat, z = z_mat,
                opacity = 0.1, colorscale = list(c(0, 1), c(ellip_col, ellip_col)),
                showscale = FALSE, hoverinfo = "none", name = "95% Ellipse") %>%
    add_trace(data = scores_subset, x = ~X, y = ~Y, z = ~Z,
              type = 'scatter3d', mode = 'markers',
              marker = list(size = 3, color = point_col, opacity = 0.9),
              text = rownames(scores_subset), showlegend = FALSE)
  
  # 画线
  line_x <- c(); line_y <- c(); line_z <- c()
  for (i in 1:nrow(loadings_scaled)) {
    line_x <- c(line_x, 0, loadings_scaled[i, 1]*0.95, NA)
    line_y <- c(line_y, 0, loadings_scaled[i, 2]*0.95, NA)
    line_z <- c(line_z, 0, loadings_scaled[i, 3]*0.95, NA)
  }
  chang <-max(loadings_scaled[i, 1],loadings_scaled[i, 2]*0.95,loadings_scaled[i, 3]*0.95)
  p <- add_trace(p, x = line_x, y = line_y, z = line_z, type = 'scatter3d', mode = 'lines',
                 line = list(color = arrow_col, width = 4), showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "none")
  
  # 画箭头头
  p <- add_trace(p, x = loadings_scaled$X, y = loadings_scaled$Y, z = loadings_scaled$Z,
                 u = loadings_scaled$X, v = loadings_scaled$Y, w = loadings_scaled$Z,
                 type = "cone", showscale = FALSE, sizemode = "absolute", sizeref = chang, anchor = "tip",
                 colorscale = list(c(0, 1), c(arrow_col, arrow_col)), name="Loadings", 
                 hoverinfo = "text", text = raw_names)
  
  # 画文字
  p <- add_trace(p, x = loadings_scaled$X * 1.15, y = loadings_scaled$Y * 1.15, z = loadings_scaled$Z * 1.15,
                 type = 'scatter3d', mode = 'text', text = formatted_names,
                 textfont = list(color = arrow_col, size = 13, family="Times New Roman"), 
                 showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "none")
  
  p <- layout(p, scene = list(
    xaxis = c(axis_template, list(title = ax_labs[1])),
    yaxis = c(axis_template, list(title = ax_labs[2])),
    zaxis = c(axis_template, list(title = ax_labs[3])),
    aspectmode = "cube", camera = list(eye = list(x=1.5, y=1.5, z=1.3))
  ),
  margin = list(l=0, r=0, b=0, t=0), paper_bgcolor = "white", showlegend=FALSE)
  
  return(p)
}

plot_pca_2d_core <- function(pca_res, var_pct, dims=c(1,2), colors) {
  point_col <- colors[1]
  arrow_col <- colors[2]
  
  # 1. 准备数据
  scores <- as.data.frame(pca_res$x[, dims])
  colnames(scores) <- c("X", "Y")
  
  loadings <- as.data.frame(pca_res$rotation[, dims])
  colnames(loadings) <- c("X", "Y")
  
  # 2. 计算缩放比例
  r_scores <- max(abs(scores))
  r_loadings <- max(abs(loadings))
  scale_factor <- (r_scores / r_loadings) * 0.85
  loadings_scaled <- loadings * scale_factor
  
  
  format_subscripts <- function(x) {
    sapply(x, function(s) {
      if(grepl("^[A-Z][A-Z0-9]+$", s)) {
        paste0(substr(s, 1, 1), "<sub>", substr(s, 2, nchar(s)), "</sub>")
      } else { s }
    })
  }
  formatted_names <- format_subscripts(rownames(loadings))
  ax_labs <- paste0("<b>PC", dims, " (", round(var_pct[dims], 2), "%)</b>")
  
  # --- [核心修改] 构造箭头列表 ---
  arrows <- list()
  for(i in 1:nrow(loadings_scaled)) {
    arrows[[i]] <- list(
      x = loadings_scaled$X[i],      # 箭头尖端 X
      y = loadings_scaled$Y[i],      # 箭头尖端 Y
      xref = "x", yref = "y",        # 尖端参考坐标系：数据轴
      ax = 0, ay = 0,                # 箭头尾部坐标：原点 (0,0)
      axref = "x", ayref = "y",      # [关键] 尾部参考坐标系：设为"x"和"y"而非默认的"pixel"
      text = "",                     # 箭头本身不带文字（文字单独用 add_text 加）
      showarrow = TRUE,
      arrowhead = 2,                 # 箭头样式 (2号比较标准，3号更尖)
      arrowsize = 1,                 # 箭头大小
      arrowwidth = 2,                # 线条宽度
      arrowcolor = arrow_col
    )
  }
  # 4. 绘图
  
  angles <- atan2(loadings_scaled$Y, loadings_scaled$X)
  
  loadings1 <- rownames(loadings)
  valid_cols <- loadings1[loadings1 %in% colnames(raw_suoxie)]
  loadings1[loadings1 %in% colnames(raw_suoxie)] <-paste0(raw_suoxie[,valid_cols])
  
  # 创建数据框方便操作
  loadings_df <- data.frame(
    loadings_scaled,
    angle = angles,
    raw_name = rownames(loadings),
    abbrev = loadings1,
    formatted_name = formatted_names   # 假设您已定义 formatted_names
  )
  
  # 按角度排序
  loadings_df <- loadings_df[order(loadings_df$angle), ]
  
  n <- nrow(loadings_df)
  scale_factors <- rep(c(1.2, 1.1), length.out = n)
  
  # 计算文本坐标
  text_x <- loadings_df$X * 1.2
  text_y <- loadings_df$Y * scale_factors
  #formatted_names <- as.character(loadings_sorted$formatted_name)
  
  p <- plot_ly() %>%
    # A. 画样本点
    add_trace(data = scores, x = ~X, y = ~Y, type = 'scatter', mode = 'markers',
              marker = list(size = 10, color = point_col, opacity = 0.8),
              text = rownames(scores), hoverinfo = "text",
              showlegend = FALSE) %>%
    
    # B. 画文字标签 (向外推一点)
    add_text(x = text_x,
             y = text_y,
             text = loadings_df$abbrev, 
             textfont = list(color = arrow_col, size = 30), 
             showlegend = FALSE) %>%
    
    # C. 布局设置 (并将箭头列表传入)
    layout(
      xaxis = list(
        title = list(
          text = ax_labs[1],
          font = list(color = "black", size = 30, weight = "bold")
        ),  
        zeroline = TRUE,             # 显示通过(0,0)的线
        zerolinewidth = 1, 
        zerolinecolor = "black",   
        showgrid = FALSE,            # 【核心】关闭网格线
        showline = TRUE,             # 【新增】显示底部坐标轴实线
        linecolor = "black",         # 坐标轴实线颜色
        ticks = "outside",           # 【新增】刻度线朝外
        ticklen = 5,
        tickfont = list(color = "black", size = 30)                 
      ), 
      yaxis = list(
        title = list(
          text = ax_labs[2],
          font = list(color = "black", size = 30, weight = "bold")
        ),
        zeroline = TRUE, 
        zerolinewidth = 1, 
        zerolinecolor = "black", 
        showgrid = FALSE,            # 【核心】关闭网格线
        showline = TRUE,             # 【新增】显示左侧坐标轴实线
        linecolor = "black",
        ticks = "outside",
        ticklen = 5,
        tickfont = list(color = "black", size = 30)  
      ),
      plot_bgcolor = "white",        # 背景设为白色
      paper_bgcolor = "white",       # 画布背景设为白色
      showlegend = FALSE, 
      margin = list(t=30, b=50, l=50, r=30), # 稍微调整边距防止文字被切
      annotations = arrows           # 传入箭头
    )
  
  return(p)
}
pca_result_selected <- pca_result
pca_result_selected$x <- pca_result$x[, 1:num_pc]
pca_result_selected$rotation <- loadings
pca_result_selected$sdev <- pca_result$sdev[1:num_pc]


final_output <- smart_pca_visualize_save(pca_result_selected, var_percent)
}
```

### 隶属函数分析与 D值计算

```{r}

# pca_result

  if (!first_value %in% colnames(raw_danwei)) 
  {first_valuedanwei <- first_value
    } else {unit_val <- raw_danwei[[first_value]]
    if (!is.na(unit_val) && nzchar(unit_val)) {
      first_valuedanwei <- paste0(first_value, "(", unit_val, ")")} 
    else {first_valuedanwei <- first_value}}

# 计算得分 (Scores)
pc_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_result$x[, 1:num_pc])
#pc_scores <- as.data.frame(pca_result$x[, 1:num_pc] %*% diag(1/pca_result$sdev[1:num_pc]))
#colnames(pc_scores) <- paste0("PC", 1:num_pc)
# 定义隶属函数 u(X)
# 公式: (X - Xmin) / (Xmax - Xmin)
calc_membership <- function(x){(x - min(x)) / (max(x) - min(x))}

u_values <- as.data.frame(lapply(pc_scores, calc_membership))
colnames(u_values) <- paste0("U", 1:ncol(u_values))

# 计算权重 (基于方差贡献率)
weights <- var_percent[1:num_pc] / sum(var_percent[1:num_pc])

# 计算综合评价值 (D值)
d_values <- as.matrix(u_values) %*% weights
final_rank <- rank(-d_values) # 降序排名
colnames(raw_data5)[1] <- first_valuedanwei
first_for_pca <- raw_data5[1]
# --- 生成类似图4 (表X) 的综合排名表 ---
# 包含: PC得分, U值, D值, 排名
comprehensive_table <- data.frame(
  first_for_pca,
  round(pc_scores, 2),
  round(u_values, 2),
  D = round(d_values, 4),
  综合排序 = final_rank,
  check.names = FALSE
)
# 将D值加入原始数据，用于后续回归和通径分析
data_with_D <- raw_data5
data_with_D$D <- as.vector(d_values)

comp_rounded <- comprehensive_table
pc_cols <- grep("^PC", names(comp_rounded))
for (col in pc_cols) {
  comp_rounded[[col]] <- sprintf("%.2f", as.numeric(comp_rounded[[col]]))
}
u_cols <- grep("^U", names(comp_rounded))
for (col in u_cols) {
  comp_rounded[[col]] <- sprintf("%.2f", as.numeric(comp_rounded[[col]]))
}
comp_rounded$D <- sprintf("%.2f", as.numeric(comp_rounded$D))
comp_rounded$综合排序 <- as.character(as.integer(comp_rounded$综合排序))

print(comp_rounded)
```

### 逐步回归

```{r}

# raw_data4

# 逐步回归
clean_data <- raw_data4[, -c(1,2)]
n_cols <- ncol(clean_data)
clean_data <- as.data.frame(clean_data)
# 分离自变量和因变量
y_raw <- clean_data[, "单株粒重"] # 最后一列
x_raw <- clean_data[, setdiff(names(clean_data), "单株粒重")] # 前面的列

# 变量重命名
original_x_names <- colnames(x_raw)
new_x_names <- paste0("X", 1:length(original_x_names))

# 创建用于分析的数据框
reg_data_renamed <- x_raw
colnames(reg_data_renamed) <- new_x_names
reg_data_renamed$y <- y_raw

# 预处理：基于 VIF 剔除共线性强的变量 (VIF < 10)==========================================================

# 创建用于筛选的数据副本
data_for_screening <- reg_data_renamed
dep_var <- "y"

# 循环直到所有 VIF < 10 或只剩下一个变量
vif_ok <- FALSE
round_num <- 0

while(!vif_ok) {
  round_num <- round_num + 1
  
  # 获取当前所有自变量
  predictors <- setdiff(names(data_for_screening), dep_var)
  
  # 如果只剩1个或0个自变量，无法/无需计算VIF，直接停止
  if(length(predictors) <= 1) {
    cat("剩余变量不足 2 个，停止 VIF 筛选。\n")
    break
  }
  
  # 建立全模型 (包含当前所有剩余变量)
  full_formula <- as.formula(paste(dep_var, "~ ."))
  full_model <- lm(full_formula, data = data_for_screening)
  
  # 计算 VIF
  # 注意：如果存在完全共线性(Aliased)，vif()可能会报错，这里假设数据已经过基础清洗
  # 如果需要更稳健，可以加 tryCatch，但通常 lm 会自动处理 NA 系数
  
  # 检查模型是否存在 NA 系数 (完全共线性)
  if(any(is.na(coef(full_model)))) {
    # 移除导致 NA 的变量
    na_vars <- names(which(is.na(coef(full_model))))
    cat(sprintf("轮次 %d: 发现完全共线性变量 %s，已移除。\n", round_num, paste(na_vars, collapse=",")))
    data_for_screening <- data_for_screening[, !names(data_for_screening) %in% na_vars]
    next #以此状态重新开始循环
  }
  
  vif_vals <- vif(full_model)
  max_vif <- max(vif_vals)
  
  if(max_vif < 10) {
    vif_ok <- TRUE 
  } else {
    # 找出 VIF 最大的变量并移除
    bad_var <- names(which.max(vif_vals))
    cat(sprintf("轮次 %d: 移除变量 %s (VIF = %.3f)\n", round_num, bad_var, max_vif))
    
    # 从数据集中移除该列
    data_for_screening <- data_for_screening[, !names(data_for_screening) %in% bad_var]
  }
}

spss_stepwise <- function(data, dependent_var_name, p_enter = 0.05, p_remove = 0.10) {
  
  dep_var <- dependent_var_name
  
  # 1. 明确获取所有预测变量的名称 (排除因变量)
  predictors <- setdiff(names(data), dep_var)
  
  # 2. 构建显式的最大模型公式 (例如: y ~ X1 + X2 + X3)
  # 这样 add1 函数就不会因为找不到 scope 而报错
  rhs_formula <- paste(predictors, collapse = " + ")
  scope_formula <- as.formula(paste(dep_var, "~", rhs_formula))
  
  # 3. 初始模型：只包含截距 (y ~ 1)
  current_model <- lm(as.formula(paste(dep_var, "~ 1")), data = data)
  
  steps_history <- list() 
  step_count <- 0
  
  # 记录初始状态
  step_count <- step_count + 1
  steps_history[[step_count]] <- list(model = current_model, action = "Start")
  
  changed <- TRUE
  while(changed) {
    changed <- FALSE
    
    # A. Forward Selection (Entry P <= 0.05)
    # add1 会对比当前模型和 scope 范围内的差异
    add_test <- add1(current_model, scope = scope_formula, test = "F")
    candidates <- add_test[!rownames(add_test) %in% c("<none>"), ]
    
    best_var <- NULL
    if (nrow(candidates) > 0) {
      min_p_idx <- which.min(candidates$`Pr(>F)`)
      best_p <- candidates$`Pr(>F)`[min_p_idx]
      
      if (best_p <= p_enter) {
        best_var <- rownames(candidates)[min_p_idx]
      }
    }
    
    if (!is.null(best_var)) {
      # 更新模型
      current_model <- update(current_model, paste(". ~ . +", best_var))
      changed <- TRUE
      step_count <- step_count + 1
      steps_history[[step_count]] <- list(model = current_model, action = "Entered")
    }
    
    # B. Backward Elimination (Removal P >= 0.10)
    # 只有当模型中不仅有截距时才检查
    if (length(coef(current_model)) > 1) { 
      drop_test <- drop1(current_model, test = "F")
      candidates_drop <- drop_test[!rownames(drop_test) %in% c("<none>"), ]
      
      worst_var <- NULL
      if (nrow(candidates_drop) > 0) {
        max_p_idx <- which.max(candidates_drop$`Pr(>F)`)
        worst_p <- candidates_drop$`Pr(>F)`[max_p_idx]
        
        if (worst_p >= p_remove) {
          worst_var <- rownames(candidates_drop)[max_p_idx]
        }
      }
      
      if (!is.null(worst_var)) {
        current_model <- update(current_model, paste(". ~ . -", worst_var))
        changed <- TRUE 
        steps_history[[step_count]] <- NULL
        break
      }
    }
  }
  return(steps_history)
}

trait_map <- data.frame(
  变量 = new_x_names,
  性状 = original_x_names,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

stepwise_results <- spss_stepwise(data_for_screening, "y")

entered_vars_order <- character()
output_rows <- list()
#new_x_names <- paste0("X", 1:length(original_x_names))
if (length(stepwise_results) > 1) {
  
  # 遍历每一步（跳过第1步空模型）
  for (i in 2:length(stepwise_results)) { 
    res <- stepwise_results[[i]]
    mod <- res$model
    summ <- summary(mod)
    
    # 构建方程字符串
    coeffs <- coef(mod)
    intercept <- coeffs[1]
    # 修改1：更新变量进入顺序列表
    current_model_vars <- names(coeffs)[-1]
    new_entered <- setdiff(current_model_vars, entered_vars_order)
    entered_vars_order <- c(entered_vars_order, new_entered)
    
    eq_str <- paste0("y = ", sprintf("%.3f", intercept))
    if (length(coeffs) > 1) {
      terms <- c()
      for (j in 2:length(coeffs)) {
        val <- coeffs[j]
        
        # 修改2：根据进入顺序生成显示名称
        raw_name <- names(coeffs)[j]
        x_index <- match(raw_name, entered_vars_order)
        display_name <- paste0("X", x_index)
        
        sign_str <- ifelse(val >= 0, " + ", " - ")
        terms <- c(terms, paste0(sign_str, sprintf("%.3f", abs(val)), display_name))
      }
      eq_str <- paste0(eq_str, paste(terms, collapse = ""))
    }
    
    # 提取统计量
    f_stat <- summ$fstatistic[1]
    p_val <- pf(f_stat, summ$fstatistic[2], summ$fstatistic[3], lower.tail = FALSE)
    
    output_rows[[i-1]] <- data.frame(
      "多元回归方程" = eq_str,
      "R²" = round(summ$r.squared, 4),
      "调整R²" = round(summ$adj.r.squared, 4),
      "F值" = round(f_stat, 2),
      "P值" = ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "< 0.001", round(p_val, 3)),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
      check.names = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # 合并结果
  regression_table <- do.call(rbind, output_rows)
  
  # --- 5. 添加变量映射说明行 ---
  original_x_names <- trait_map$性状[match(current_model_vars, trait_map$变量)]
  new_x_names <- paste0("X", 1:(length(coeffs)-1))
  # 构建映射文本
  mapping_text <- paste(paste(new_x_names, original_x_names, sep="为"), collapse="；")
  
  # 创建说明行
  new_row <- data.frame(
    "多元回归方程" = paste("注：", mapping_text),
    "R²" = "",
    "调整R²" = "",
    "F值" = "",
    "P值" = "",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    check.names = FALSE 
  )
}
reg_rounded <- regression_table

print(regression_table)
```

### 通径分析+灰色关联度分析

```{r}

# reg_data_renamed

# 通径分析 (Path Analysis
path_data <- reg_data_renamed[,c(names(coeffs)[-1], "y")]
colnames(path_data) <- c(new_x_names, "y")
selected_vars <- new_x_names # 排除截距
#selected_vars <- colnames(raw_data5)[-c(1:13)]
selected_vars2 <- paste0("→",selected_vars)
selected_vars3 <- selected_vars
#selected_vars <- trait_map$性状[match(selected_vars, trait_map$变量)]
if(length(selected_vars) > 0){
  
  # 计算相关系数矩阵
  sub_data <- path_data
  
  if(sum(is.na(sub_data)) > 0){
    sub_data <- na.omit(sub_data)
  }
  
  cor_mat <- cor(sub_data)
  
  # 直接通径系数 (即标准化回归系数 - Beta)
  # 标准化数据再回归一次可得 Beta
  std_data <- as.data.frame(scale(sub_data))
  path_model <- lm(y ~ ., data = std_data)
  direct_coefs <- coef(path_model)[-1]
  
  # 初始化通径分析表
  path_table <- matrix(0, nrow = length(selected_vars), ncol = length(selected_vars) + 4)
  rownames(path_table) <- selected_vars
  colnames(path_table) <- c("变量", "相关系数", "直接作用", selected_vars,"决策系数")
  
  for(i in 1:length(selected_vars)){
    var_name <- selected_vars[i]
    path_table[i, "变量"] <- selected_vars3[i]
    
    # 相关系数
    path_table[i, "相关系数"] <- round(cor_mat[var_name, "y"], 3)
    
    # 直接作用
    path_table[i, "直接作用"] <- round(direct_coefs[var_name], 3)
    
    # 间接作用 - 填充所有单元格
    for(j in 1:length(selected_vars)){
      target_var <- selected_vars[j]
      
      if(i == j) {
        # 主对角线：自身对自身的间接作用为0或空
        path_table[i, target_var] <- ""
      } else {
        # 非对角线：计算间接作用
        r_ij <- cor_mat[var_name, target_var]
        matched_name <- grep(target_var, names(direct_coefs), value = TRUE)
        indirect_effect <- r_ij * direct_coefs[matched_name]
        
        # 如果值为0（或接近0），则显示为空
        if(abs(indirect_effect) < 0.001) {
          path_table[i, target_var] <- ""
        } else {
          path_table[i, target_var] <- round(indirect_effect, 3)
        }
      }
    }
  }
  colnames(path_table) <- c("变量", "相关系数", "直接作用", selected_vars2,"决策系数")
  # 将矩阵转换为数据框
  path_output_table <- as.data.frame(path_table, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  path_output_table$相关系数 <- as.numeric(path_output_table$相关系数)
  path_output_table$直接作用 <- as.numeric(path_output_table$直接作用)
  #path_output_table$决策系数 <- as.numeric(path_output_table$决策系数)
  path_output_table$决策系数 <- sprintf(
    "%.3f", 
    2*path_output_table$相关系数 * path_output_table$直接作用 - path_output_table$直接作用^2
  )
  
  # 确保列类型正确
  for(col in colnames(path_output_table)){
    if(col != "变量"){
      # 尝试转换为数值，如果失败则保持为字符
      num_vals <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(path_output_table[[col]]))
      if(!all(is.na(num_vals))) {
        path_output_table[[col]] <- num_vals
      }
    }
  }
  
} else {
  path_output_table <- data.frame(Message="未筛选出显著变量，无法进行通径分析")
}
path_rounded <- path_output_table
print(path_rounded)
# 5. 灰色关联度分析 (Grey Relational Analysis)------
# reg_data_renamed
# 参考序列: y (标准化)
# 比较序列: 所有的 X (标准化)
if(sum(is.na(reg_data_renamed)) > 0){
  reg_data_renamed1 <- na.omit(reg_data_renamed)
}
ref_seq <- reg_data_renamed1$y
comp_seq <- reg_data_renamed1[, -ncol(reg_data_renamed1)] # 去掉y列

# 均值化处理 (Dimensionless processing)
normalize_mean <- function(x) { x / mean(x) }

ref_norm <- normalize_mean(ref_seq)
comp_norm <- as.data.frame(lapply(comp_seq, normalize_mean))

# 计算关联系数
rho <- 0.5 # 分辨系数
abs_diff_matrix <- abs(sweep(comp_norm, 1, ref_norm, "-")) # |X0 - Xi|
min_diff <- min(abs_diff_matrix)
max_diff <- max(abs_diff_matrix)

# 关联系数矩阵
xi_matrix <- (min_diff + rho * max_diff) / (abs_diff_matrix + rho * max_diff)

# 计算关联度 (取均值)
grey_degree <- colMeans(xi_matrix)
grey_rank <- rank(-grey_degree)

# --- 生成类似图2 (表X) 的灰色关联度表 ---
# 包含: 关联度, 排名, 权重(可选, 归一化关联度)
grey_table <- data.frame(
  性状 = colnames(x_raw),
  关联度 = round(grey_degree, 4),
  位次 = grey_rank
)
# 计算权重 (基于关联度占比)
grey_table$权重 <- round(grey_table$关联度 / sum(grey_table$关联度), 4)
grey_rounded <- grey_table
grey_rounded$关联度<- sprintf("%.4f", as.numeric(grey_rounded$关联度))
grey_rounded$权重 <- sprintf("%.4f", as.numeric(grey_rounded$权重))
grey_rounded$位次 <- as.character(as.integer(grey_rounded$位次))
print(grey_rounded)
```

### TOPSIS

```{r}

# clean_data_for_pca

  X <- as.matrix(clean_data_for_pca)
  n <- nrow(X) # 样本数
  m <- ncol(X) # 指标数
  # --- Step 1: 正向化与标准化 (Min-Max Normalization) ---
  # 假设所有指标都是"正向指标"（数值越大越好，如生物量、产量）
  # 如果有负向指标（越小越好），计算方式需改为 (max-x)/(max-min)
  X_norm <- apply(X, 2, function(x) {
    if(max(x) == min(x)) return(rep(1, length(x))) # 防止分母为0
    (max(x)-x)/(max(x)-min(x))
  })
  # --- Step 2: 熵权法 (Entropy Weight) ---
  # 计算比重 P_ij
  P <- apply(X_norm, 2, function(x) x / sum(x))
  # 计算熵值 e_j
  # 引入微小量 1e-12 防止 log(0)
  k <- 1 / log(n)
  e_j <- -k * colSums(P * log(P+ 1e-12))
  
  # 处理特殊情况：如果某列数值完全相同，熵可能溢出或为NaN，修正为1
  #e_j[is.na(e_j)] <- 1 
  # 计算差异系数 d_j
  d_j <- 1 - e_j
  # 计算权重 w_j
  w_j <- d_j / sum(d_j)
  # 生成结果表 1：熵权结果
  entropy_result <- data.frame(
    性状 = names(w_j),
    熵值 = round(e_j, 3),
    差异系数 = round(d_j, 3),
    权重 = round(w_j * 100, 3) # 转换为百分比
  )
  colnames(entropy_result)[4] <- "权重(%)"
  # --- Step 3: TOPSIS 计算 ---
  # 构建加权规范化矩阵
  Z <- t(t(X_norm) * w_j)
  
  # 确定正理想解 (Z+) 和 负理想解 (Z-)
  Z_plus <- apply(Z, 2, max)
  Z_minus <- apply(Z, 2, min)
  
  # 计算欧几里得距离 D+ 和 D-
  D_plus <- sqrt(rowSums(sweep(Z, 2, Z_plus, "-")^2))
  D_minus <- sqrt(rowSums(sweep(Z, 2, Z_minus, "-")^2))
  
  # 计算综合得分 C (Score)
  # Score = D- / (D+ + D-)
  C_score <- D_minus / (D_plus + D_minus)
  # 生成结果表 2：TOPSIS 排名
  topsis_result <- data.frame(
    正理想解距离 = round(D_plus, 3),
    负理想解距离 = round(D_minus, 3),
    贴合度 = round(C_score, 3)
  )
  topsis_result$排序 <- rank(-topsis_result$贴合度)
table2_topsis <- cbind(Treatment = raw_data5[, 1],topsis_result)
print(table2_topsis)
```

### 数据导出

```{r}
# 自动过滤不存在的表，只保留已生成的结果
output_list <- list()

if (exists("table_data_final")) {
  output_list[["均值与多重比较"]] <- table_data_final}

if (exists("formatted_cor_df")) {
  output_list[["相关性分析"]] <- formatted_cor_df}

if (exists("df_plot1")) {
  output_list[["平均值"]] <- df_plot1}

if (exists("pca_rounded")) {
  output_list[["PCA"]] <- pca_rounded}

if (exists("comp_rounded")) {
  output_list[["综合评价"]] <- comp_rounded}

if (exists("entropy_result")) {
  output_list[["熵权法"]] <- entropy_result}

if (exists("table2_topsis")) {
  output_list[["TOPSIS"]] <- table2_topsis}

if (exists("regression_table") && exists("new_row")) {
  output_list[["逐步回归"]] <- rbind(regression_table, new_row)}

if (exists("path_rounded")) {
  output_list[["通径分析"]] <- path_rounded}

if (exists("grey_rounded")) {
  output_list[["灰色关联度分析"]] <- grey_rounded}

if (exists("res_anova_spss_list")) {
  output_list[["参数非参数检验"]] <- do.call(rbind, res_anova_spss_list)}

wb <- openxlsx::createWorkbook()

# 定义样式
# 1. 基础居中样式 (用于合并后的统计行)
center_style <- openxlsx::createStyle(
  halign = "center", 
  valign = "center"
)

# 2. 带有底边框的居中样式 (用于最后一行)
last_row_center_style <- openxlsx::createStyle(
  halign = "center", 
  valign = "center",
  border = "bottom",
  borderColour = "black",
  borderStyle = "thin"
)

# 3. 原始表头样式
header_style <- openxlsx::createStyle(
  halign = "center", 
  valign = "center",
  textDecoration = "bold", 
  border = c("top", "bottom"), 
  borderStyle = "thin"
)
if (exists("table_data_final")){ 
  addWorksheet(wb, "均值与多重比较", gridLines = FALSE)
  writeData(wb, "均值与多重比较", table_data_final)
  # 获取数据行号
  n_rows_total <- nrow(table_data_final) + 1
  stat_start_row <- (n_rows_total - 4) # 统计量开始的行号
  
  # A. 处理表头合并 (第1行)
  for (i in 1:length(all_traits)) {
    start_col <- i * 2
    end_col <- i * 2 + 1
    mergeCells(wb, "均值与多重比较", rows = 1, cols = start_col:end_col)
    addStyle(wb, "均值与多重比较", header_style, rows = 1, cols = start_col:end_col, gridExpand = TRUE)
  }
  # 第一列的表头也应用样式
  addStyle(wb, "均值与多重比较", header_style, rows = 1, cols = 1)
  
  # B. 处理底部五行统计量的合并 (最后5行)
  for (r in stat_start_row:n_rows_total) {
    # 遍历每个性状对应的两列
    for (i in 1:length(all_traits)) {
      start_col <- i * 2
      end_col <- i * 2 + 1
      
      # 执行合并
      mergeCells(wb, "均值与多重比较", rows = r, cols = start_col:end_col)
      
      # 应用居中样式（如果是最后一行 P值，则加上底边框）
      if (r == n_rows_total) {
        addStyle(wb, "均值与多重比较", last_row_center_style, rows = r, cols = start_col:end_col, gridExpand = TRUE)
      } else {
        addStyle(wb, "均值与多重比较", center_style, rows = r, cols = start_col:end_col, gridExpand = TRUE)
      }
    }
    
    # 第一列（统计名称列）也需要底线样式
    if (r == n_rows_total) {
      addStyle(wb, "均值与多重比较", last_row_center_style, rows = r, cols = 1)
    }
  }
  
  # C. 处理中间的数据行 (Group数据行)
  data_area_end <- stat_start_row - 1
  for (i in 1:length(all_traits)) {
    m_col <- i * 2
    l_col <- i * 2 + 1
    # 均值右对齐，字母左对齐 (保持学术美感)
    addStyle(wb, "均值与多重比较", createStyle(halign = "right"), rows = 2:data_area_end, cols = m_col, gridExpand = TRUE)
    addStyle(wb, "均值与多重比较", createStyle(halign = "left"), rows = 2:data_area_end, cols = l_col, gridExpand = TRUE)
  }
  
  # D. 调整列宽
  setColWidths(wb, "均值与多重比较", cols = 1, widths = 12)
  for (i in 1:length(all_traits)) {
    setColWidths(wb, "均值与多重比较", cols = i*2, widths = 7)
    setColWidths(wb, "均值与多重比较", cols = i*2+1, widths = 4)}
  
  addStyle(wb, "均值与多重比较", createStyle(border = "bottom",halign = "left"), rows = n_rows_total, cols = 1, gridExpand = TRUE)
  
  border_bottom_z <- createStyle(border = "bottom", borderColour = "black", borderStyle = "thin")
} 


# 处理每个数据框
for (sheet_name in names(output_list)) {
  if(sheet_name !="均值与多重比较"){
    df <- output_list[[sheet_name]]
    # 转换为数据框（处理非数据框对象）
    if (!is.data.frame(df)) { df <- as.data.frame(df) }
    # 添加工作表
    addWorksheet(wb,sheet_name,,gridLines = FALSE);writeData(wb, sheet_name, df)
    # 获取维度
    n_rows <- nrow(df)
    n_cols <- ncol(df)
    if(sheet_name == "逐步回归"){ mergeCells(wb, "逐步回归", 
      rows =n_rows+1, cols = 1:n_cols) 
      n_rows= n_rows-1 }
    
    if (n_rows > 0 && n_cols > 0&& sheet_name != "均值与多重比较") {
      # 应用表头样式n
      addStyle(wb, sheet = sheet_name, 
               style = header_style, 
               rows = 1, 
               cols = 1:n_cols,
               gridExpand = TRUE)
      
      # 应用主体样式
      if (n_rows > 1) {
        addStyle(wb, sheet = sheet_name, 
                 style = center_style, 
                 rows = 2:(n_rows + 1), 
                 cols = 2:n_cols,
                 gridExpand = TRUE)
      }
      
      # 应用底部粗线样式
      addStyle(wb, sheet = sheet_name, 
               style = last_row_center_style, 
               rows = n_rows + 1, 
               cols = 1:n_cols,
               gridExpand = TRUE)
      
      addStyle(wb, sheet = sheet_name,
               createStyle(border = "bottom",halign = "left"),
               rows = n_rows + 1, cols = 1, gridExpand = TRUE)
      if (n_rows > 1) {
        addStyle(wb, sheet = sheet_name,
                 createStyle(halign = "left"),
                 rows = 2:n_rows, cols = 1, gridExpand = TRUE)
      }
      # 设置列宽
      setColWidths(wb, sheet = sheet_name, 
                   cols = 1:n_cols, 
                   widths = "auto")
    }
  }
}
# 保存工作簿
saveWorkbook(wb, file.path(output_dir, "2025297.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)
```

### 拟合方程

```{r}

# raw_data1

fit_plot_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "nihetu")
if(!dir.exists(fit_plot_dir)) dir.create(fit_plot_dir)

reg_data <- raw_data1[,-2]
x_col_name <- colnames(reg_data)[1]
# 尝试将第一列转为数值 (防止它是字符型的 "15", "30" 等)
reg_data[[1]] <- as.numeric(as.character(reg_data[[1]]))
x_vals <- reg_data[[1]]


# 计算 P 值
get_model_pvalue <- function(model, y_vals) {
  tryCatch({
    if (inherits(model, "lm")) {
      f <- summary(model)$fstatistic
      if (is.null(f)) return(NA)
      p <- pf(f[1], f[2], f[3], lower.tail = FALSE)
      return(p)
    } else if (inherits(model, "nls")) {
      rss <- sum(residuals(model)^2)
      tss <- sum((y_vals - mean(y_vals))^2)
      n <- length(y_vals)
      p <- length(coef(model)) 
      df_num <- p - 1 
      df_den <- n - p
      if (df_den <= 0) return(NA)
      f_stat <- ((tss - rss) / df_num) / (rss / df_den)
      p <- pf(f_stat, df_num, df_den, lower.tail = FALSE)
      return(p)
    }
    return(NA)
  }, error = function(e) NA)
}

# 计算 NLS 的 R2 (伪 R2)
calc_r2 <- function(model, y_vals) {
  rss <- sum(residuals(model)^2)
  tss <- sum((y_vals - mean(y_vals))^2)
  return(1 - (rss / tss))
}
```
