```{r}
# 格式化数字：保留小数，去除不必要的0，处理绝对值
fmt_val <- function(x, digits = 4) {
  val <- abs(x)
  # 如果数字极小但不是0，使用科学计数法或更多小数位，否则保留指定位数
  if (val < 10^(-digits) && val > 0) {
    return(format(val, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3))
  } else {
    return(sprintf(paste0("%.", digits, "f"), val))
  }
}

# 获取符号 (+ 或 -)
get_op <- function(x) {
  if (x < 0) return("-") else return("+")
}

# 循环拟合与绘图

manual_x_pos <- "left"    # "left", "center", "right"
manual_y_pos <- "bottom"  # "top", "middle", "bottom"
chinese_font <- "SimHei"  # 字体

trait_cols <- colnames(reg_data)[-1]
model_stats_list <- list() # 用于存储结果

for (trait in trait_cols) {
  y_vals <- reg_data[[trait]]
  df_fit <- data.frame(x = reg_data[[1]], y = y_vals)
  df_fit <- na.omit(df_fit) 
  
  # 样本太少跳过
  if(nrow(df_fit) < 4) next 
  
  models <- list()
  
  # 1. 线性模型 (Linear): y = ax + b
  try({
    m_lin <- lm(y ~ x, data = df_fit)
    models$Linear <- list(mod = m_lin, type = "lm")
  }, silent = TRUE)
  
  # 2. 对数模型 (Logarithmic): y = a + b * ln(x)
  try({
    if(all(df_fit$x > 0)) {
      m_log <- lm(y ~ log(x), data = df_fit)
      models$Logarithmic <- list(mod = m_log, type = "lm")
    }
  }, silent = TRUE)
  
  # 3. 二次多项式 (Quadratic): y = ax^2 + bx + c
  try({
    m_quad <- lm(y ~ I(x^2) + x, data = df_fit) # 注意 R 中系数顺序通常是 Intercept, x^2, x 或 Intercept, x, x^2
    models$Quadratic <- list(mod = m_quad, type = "lm")
  }, silent = TRUE)
  
  # 4. 指数模型 (Exponential): y = a * e^(bx)
  try({
    # 使用线性化获取初值
    if(all(df_fit$y > 0)) {
      lin_exp <- lm(log(y) ~ x, data = df_fit)
      start_exp <- list(a = exp(coef(lin_exp)[1]), b = coef(lin_exp)[2])
      m_exp <- nls(y ~ a * exp(b * x), data = df_fit, start = start_exp)
      models$Exponential <- list(mod = m_exp, type = "nls")
    }
  }, silent = TRUE)
  
  # 5. 幂函数模型 (Power): y = a * x^b   <---【新增】
  try({
    # 要求 x>0 且 y>0 (为了获取初值)
    if(all(df_fit$x > 0) && all(df_fit$y > 0)) {
      lin_pow <- lm(log(y) ~ log(x), data = df_fit)
      start_pow <- list(a = exp(coef(lin_pow)[1]), b = coef(lin_pow)[2])
      m_pow <- nls(y ~ a * x^b, data = df_fit, start = start_pow)
      models$Power <- list(mod = m_pow, type = "nls")
    }
  }, silent = TRUE)
  
  # 6. 双曲线模型 (Hyperbolic): y = a + b/x  <---【新增】
  try({
    if(all(df_fit$x != 0)) {
      # 线性化为 y ~ 1/x
      m_hyp <- lm(y ~ I(1/x), data = df_fit)
      models$Hyperbolic <- list(mod = m_hyp, type = "lm")
    }
  }, silent = TRUE)
  a = 2
  if(a == 1){
    # 7. Logistic (3-Parameter)
    try({
      m_logis <- nls(y ~ SSlogis(x, Asym, xmid, scal), data = df_fit)
      models$Logistic_3P <- list(mod = m_logis, type = "nls")
    }, silent = TRUE)
    
    # 8. Logistic (4-Parameter)
    try({
      m_logis4 <- nls(y ~ SSfpl(x, A, B, xmid, scal), data = df_fit)
      models$Logistic_4P <- list(mod = m_logis4, type = "nls")
    }, silent = TRUE)
    
    # 9. 米氏方程 (Michaelis-Menten): y = (Vm * x) / (K + x)
    try({
      m_mm <- nls(y ~ SSmicmen(x, Vm, K), data = df_fit)
      models$Michaelis_Menten <- list(mod = m_mm, type = "nls")
    }, silent = TRUE)
  }
  
  # ------ 提取统计量与构建标准公式字符串 ------
  stats_row <- data.frame()
  options(scipen = 999)
  
  for (m_name in names(models)) {
    obj <- models[[m_name]]
    mod <- obj$mod
    
    # 统计量
    if(obj$type == "lm") {
      r2 <- summary(mod)$r.squared
    } else {
      r2 <- calc_r2(mod, df_fit$y)
    }
    p_val <- get_model_pvalue(mod, df_fit$y)
    aic_val <- AIC(mod)
    
    coefs <- coef(mod)
    eq_excel <- "" # 论文标准格式字符串
    eq_plot <- ""  # R绘图用的 plotmath 表达式
    
    if(m_name == "Linear") {
      # y = ax + b (注意lm默认是 intercept, x，即 b, a)
      b_val <- coefs[1] # Intercept
      a_val <- coefs[2] # Slope
      sign_b <- ifelse(b_val < 0, "-", "+")
      
      eq_excel <- sprintf("y = %sx %s %s", fmt_val(a_val), sign_b, fmt_val(b_val))
      eq_plot <- sprintf("italic(y) == %s * italic(x) ~ '%s' ~ %s", 
                         fmt_val(a_val), sign_b, fmt_val(b_val))
      
    } else if (m_name == "Logarithmic") {
      # y = a + b ln(x)
      a_val <- coefs[1] # Intercept
      b_val <- coefs[2] # Slope for log(x)
      sign_b <- ifelse(b_val < 0, "-", "+")
      
      eq_excel <- sprintf("y = %s %s %s ln(x)", fmt_val(a_val), sign_b, fmt_val(b_val))
      eq_plot <- sprintf("italic(y) == %s ~ '%s' ~ %s * ln(italic(x))", 
                         fmt_val(a_val), sign_b, fmt_val(b_val))
      
    } else if (m_name == "Quadratic") {
      # y = ax^2 + bx + c
      # coefs通常顺序: (Intercept), I(x^2), x  或者取决于公式写法
      # 我们上面写的是 lm(y ~ I(x^2) + x) -> Intercept, I(x^2), x
      c_val <- coefs[1]
      a_val <- coefs[2]
      b_val <- coefs[3]
      
      sign_b <- ifelse(b_val < 0, "-", "+")
      sign_c <- ifelse(c_val < 0, "-", "+")
      
      eq_excel <- sprintf("y = %sx^2 %s %sx %s %s", 
                          fmt_val(a_val), sign_b, fmt_val(b_val), sign_c, fmt_val(c_val))
      eq_plot <- sprintf("italic(y) == %s * italic(x)^2 ~ '%s' ~ %s * italic(x) ~ '%s' ~ %s", 
                         fmt_val(a_val), sign_b, fmt_val(b_val), sign_c, fmt_val(c_val))
      
    } else if (m_name == "Exponential") {
      # y = a * e^(bx)
      a_val <- coefs['a']
      b_val <- coefs['b']
      
      eq_excel <- sprintf("y = %s * e^(%sx)", fmt_val(a_val), fmt_val(b_val))
      eq_plot <- sprintf("italic(y) == %s * e^{%s * italic(x)}", fmt_val(a_val), fmt_val(b_val))
      
    } else if (m_name == "Power") {
      # y = a * x^b
      a_val <- coefs['a']
      b_val <- coefs['b']
      
      eq_excel <- sprintf("y = %s * x^%s", fmt_val(a_val), fmt_val(b_val))
      eq_plot <- sprintf("italic(y) == %s * italic(x)^%s", fmt_val(a_val), fmt_val(b_val))
      
    } else if (m_name == "Hyperbolic") {
      # y = a + b/x
      # lm(y ~ I(1/x)) -> Intercept (a), Slope (b)
      a_val <- coefs[1]
      b_val <- coefs[2]
      sign_b <- ifelse(b_val < 0, "-", "+")
      
      eq_excel <- sprintf("y = %s %s %s/x", fmt_val(a_val), sign_b, fmt_val(b_val))
      eq_plot <- sprintf("italic(y) == %s ~ '%s' ~ frac(%s, italic(x))", 
                         fmt_val(a_val), sign_b, fmt_val(b_val))
      
    } else if (m_name == "Logistic_3P") {
      # y = Asym / (1 + e^((xmid - x)/scal))
      asym <- coefs['Asym']; xmid <- coefs['xmid']; scal <- coefs['scal']
      
      eq_excel <- sprintf("y = %s / (1 + e^((%s - x)/%s))", fmt_val(asym), fmt_val(xmid), fmt_val(scal))
      eq_plot <- sprintf("italic(y) == frac(%s, 1 + e^{frac(%s - italic(x), %s)})", 
                         fmt_val(asym), fmt_val(xmid), fmt_val(scal))
      
    } else if (m_name == "Logistic_4P") {
      A <- coefs['A']; B <- coefs['B']; xmid <- coefs['xmid']; scal <- coefs['scal']
      # 简化显示分子 (B-A) 通常为上渐近线减下渐近线，或保持原样
      # 标准形式: y = A + (B-A)/(1+exp(...))
      num_val <- B - A
      sign_num <- ifelse(num_val < 0, "-", "+")
      
      eq_excel <- sprintf("y = %s %s (%s) / (1 + e^((%s - x)/%s))", 
                          fmt_val(A), sign_num, fmt_val(num_val), fmt_val(xmid), fmt_val(scal))
      eq_plot <- sprintf("italic(y) == %s ~ '%s' ~ frac(%s, 1 + e^{frac(%s - italic(x), %s)})", 
                         fmt_val(A), sign_num, fmt_val(num_val), fmt_val(xmid), fmt_val(scal))
      
    } else if (m_name == "Michaelis_Menten") {
      # y = Vm * x / (K + x)
      vm <- coefs['Vm']; k <- coefs['K']
      
      eq_excel <- sprintf("y = (%s * x) / (%s + x)", fmt_val(vm), fmt_val(k))
      eq_plot <- sprintf("italic(y) == frac(%s * italic(x), %s + italic(x))", fmt_val(vm), fmt_val(k))
    }
    
    tmp <- data.frame(
      Trait = trait,
      Model = m_name,
      R2 = r2,
      AIC = aic_val,
      P_Value = p_val,
      Equation_Excel = eq_excel, # 导出到Excel的标准格式
      Equation_Plot = eq_plot,   # 绘图用的代码
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    stats_row <- rbind(stats_row, tmp)
  }
  
  #绘图 -------------
  if (nrow(stats_row) > 0) {
    # 按 R2 排序选最佳模型
    stats_row <- stats_row %>% arrange(desc(R2))
    
    best_model_name <- stats_row$Model[1]
    best_model_obj <- models[[best_model_name]]$mod
    best_eq_plot <- stats_row$Equation_Plot[1]
    best_r2 <- stats_row$R2[1]
    
    model_stats_list[[trait]] <- stats_row
    
    # 生成预测线数据
    x_seq <- seq(min(df_fit$x), max(df_fit$x), length.out = 200)
    pred_y <- predict(best_model_obj, newdata = data.frame(x = x_seq))
    df_pred <- data.frame(x = x_seq, y = pred_y)
    
    # 格式化 P 值显示
    pval_disp <- stats_row$P_Value[1]
    pval_str <- if(is.na(pval_disp)) "" else {
      if(pval_disp < 0.001) "***" else if(pval_disp < 0.01) "**" else if(pval_disp < 0.05) "*" else ""
    }
    
    y_range <- max(df_fit$y) - min(df_fit$y)
    x_range <- max(df_fit$x) - min(df_fit$x)
    
    # X 位置
    if (manual_x_pos == "center") {
      final_x <- min(df_fit$x) + 0.5 * x_range
      h_just <- 0.5
    } else if (manual_x_pos == "right") {
      final_x <- max(df_fit$x)
      h_just <- 1
    } else {
      final_x <- min(df_fit$x)
      h_just <- 0
    }
    
    # Y 位置 (R2与公式稍微错开)
    if (manual_y_pos == "bottom") {
      final_y <- min(df_fit$y) + 0.05 * y_range 
      v_just <- 0 
    } else if (manual_y_pos == "middle") {
      final_y <- min(df_fit$y) + 0.5 * y_range
      v_just <- 0.5
    } else {
      final_y <- max(df_fit$y) - 0.05 * y_range 
      v_just <- 1 
    }
    
    # 构建绘图标签
    label_eq <- best_eq_plot
    label_r2 <- sprintf("italic(R)^2 == %.3f ~ '%s'", best_r2, pval_str)
    # 将公式和R2合并 (如果不希望合并在同一行，可以分两个annotate写)
    label_combined <- sprintf("atop(%s, %s)", label_eq, label_r2) 
    
    p_fit <- ggplot(df_fit, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
      geom_point(size = 2, color = "black") + # 点稍微大一点
      geom_line(data = df_pred, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "red", linewidth = 1) + # 拟合线标红加粗便于区分
      
      labs(x = paste0(x_col_name,"(",raw_danwei[,x_col_name],")"), y = paste0(trait,"(",raw_danwei[,trait],")"), title = NULL) +
      
      annotate("text", x = final_x, y = final_y, 
               label = label_combined, parse = TRUE,
               hjust = h_just, vjust = v_just, size = 5, family = "sans",
               fontface = "bold" ,colour = "black") + 
      
      theme_bw() +
      theme(
        #text = element_text(family = chinese_font), 
        panel.grid = element_blank(),     
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 24, face = "bold"), 
        axis.title = element_text(color = "black",size = 24, face = "bold")
      )
    print(p_fit)
    # 保存图片
    ggsave(file.path(fit_plot_dir, paste0(raw_suoxie[,trait], "_nihe.pdf")), 
           p_fit, width = 5, height = 4,device = cairo_pdf)
  }
}

# 导出表格-------------
final_model_stats <- do.call(rbind, model_stats_list)
final_model_stats$Equation_Plot <- NULL



# 1. 对表格内容进行格式处理，将 R 的公式符号转换为 HTML 上标标签
formatted_stats <- final_model_stats %>%
  group_by(Trait) %>%
  arrange(desc(R2)) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    # 处理列名中的 R2 -> R² (使用 HTML 标签)
    # 注意：这里我们处理的是数据内容，列名稍后处理
    
    # --- 处理公式列 ---
    # 1. 处理带括号的指数，例如 e^(0.5x) -> e<sup>0.5x</sup>
    Equation_Excel = str_replace_all(Equation_Excel, "\\^\\(([^)]+)\\)", "<sup>\\1</sup>"),
    
    # 2. 处理简单的数字指数，例如 x^2 -> x<sup>2</sup>
    Equation_Excel = str_replace_all(Equation_Excel, "\\^([0-9.-]+)", "<sup>\\1</sup>"),
    
    # 3. 替换乘号 * 为论文常用的 × 或省略
    Equation_Excel = str_replace_all(Equation_Excel, "\\*", "×"),
    
    # 4. 优化 R2 和 P 值的显示 (可选)
    R2 = sprintf("%.3f", R2),
    P_Value = ifelse(is.na(P_Value), "", 
                     ifelse(P_Value < 0.001, "< 0.001", sprintf("%.3f", P_Value)))
  )

# 2. 构建 HTML 表格字符串
# 定义 CSS 样式，使 Excel 打开时带有边框和居中
html_content <- paste0(
  "<html><head><meta charset='UTF-8'></head><body>",
  #"<table style='border-collapse: collapse; font-family: Times New Roman; text-align: center;'>",
  "<table style='font-family: Times New Roman; text-align: center;'>",
  
  # --- 表头 ---
  "<thead><tr style='font-weight: bold;'>",
  "<th  style='border-bottom: 0.1px solid black;border-top: 0.2px solid black;'>性状</th>",
  "<th  style='border-bottom: 0.1px solid black;border-top: 0.2px solid black;'>回归方程</th>", # 重命名公式列
  "<th  style='border-bottom: 0.1px solid black;border-top: 0.2px solid black;'>R<sup>2</sup></th>", # 列名里的 R平方
  "</tr></thead>",
  
  # --- 表格体 ---
  "<tbody>"
)

# 循环添加每一行数据
for(i in 1:(nrow(formatted_stats)-1)){
  row_str <- paste0(
    "<tr>",
    "<td>", formatted_stats$Trait[i], "</td>",
    "<td style='text-align: left;'>", formatted_stats$Equation_Excel[i], "</td>", 
    "<td style='text-align: center;'>", 
    formatted_stats$R2[i],
    if(formatted_stats$P_Value[i] < 0.001) "***" else if(formatted_stats$P_Value[i] < 0.01) "**" else if(formatted_stats$P_Value[i] < 0.05) "*" else "",
    "</td>",
    "</tr>"
  )
  html_content <- paste0(html_content, row_str)
}

for(i in nrow(formatted_stats):nrow(formatted_stats)) {
  row_str <- paste0(
    "<tr>",
    "<td style='border-bottom: 0.2px solid black;'>", formatted_stats$Trait[i], "</td>",
    "<td style='border-bottom: 0.2px solid black;text-align: left;'>", formatted_stats$Equation_Excel[i],
    if(formatted_stats$P_Value[i] < 0.001) "***" else if(formatted_stats$P_Value[i] < 0.01) "**" else if(formatted_stats$P_Value[i] < 0.05) "*" else "",
    "</td>", 
    "<td style='border-bottom: 0.2px solid black;text-align: center;'>", formatted_stats$R2[i], "</td>",
    "</tr>"
  )
  html_content <- paste0(html_content, row_str)
}

html_content <- paste0(html_content, "</tbody></table></body></html>")

# 3. 导出文件
#以此后缀 .xls 命名，Excel 会默认以兼容模式打开并渲染 HTML 标签
out_file <- file.path(output_dir, "模型.xlsx")
writeLines(html_content,out_file)
print(out_file)
```
